- docs(architecture-runtime-planes): expand high-level architecture/communication docs with the dual-plane runtime model (`/ws` streaming plus `/api/runs/*` control plane), VM worker runtime placement in Electron main, and OpenAI provider native-reasoning runtime note so system-level docs match current backend/frontend execution surfaces.
- docs(sidecar-tool-contract-and-runtime-hub-sync): fix sidecar docs mismatch for `system_use` top-level `explanation` requirement, clarify sidecar schema-vs-runtime enforcement boundaries, repair malformed front-matter in local-backend lifecycle reference, and refresh backend/frontend runtime hub scope plus docs-hub links for the new runtime surface pages.
- docs(frontend-runtime-surface-main-renderer-sidecar-vm-worker): add a new frontend runtime deep reference covering Electron composition splits, IPC/session state contracts, global stop shortcut runtime behavior, VM worker `/api/runs/*` relay flow, and sidecar feature-pack + unified-wrapper tool exposure; wire links from frontend runtime/functionality hubs and refresh frontend architecture notes.
- docs(backend-runtime-surface-query-loop-vm-runs): add a new backend runtime deep reference that documents app route assembly, query_execution_support helper boundaries, interaction-loop/tool-orchestrator contracts, OpenAI Responses-native reasoning routing, and `/api/runs/*` VM control runtime behavior; wire links from backend runtime/functionality hubs and refresh backend architecture notes.
- docs(planning-browser-launcher): add a dated planning note for the dedicated Windie browser launcher/profile-branding approach, including shortcut strategy, platform-specific constraints, optional profile-metadata seeding, and follow-up docs/index wiring.
- docs(frontend-global-stop-shortcut-settings): refresh the user guide, frontend architecture, and onboarding runtime docs so they describe the configurable global stop shortcut, its platform defaults, the local-only config boundary, and the way onboarding mirrors the saved accelerator.
- docs(frontend-onboarding-layout): document the viewport-capped onboarding card and fixed footer action contract so short-window regressions stay aligned with the renderer implementation.
- docs(frontend-main-surface-runtime): refresh frontend architecture and window lifecycle references so they document the new `surface_runtime` owner, centralized `window_platform_policy`, and supervisor-owned sidecar/wakeword subprocess state.
- docs(frontend-chat-pill-capture-policy): correct the main overlay lifecycle doc so it matches runtime reality: Linux owns automatic screenshot-time chat-pill hide/restore suppression, while Windows/macOS keep generic pill show/hide APIs but use no-op screenshot surface-visibility runtimes.

### Added
- feat(settings-memory-reset-controls): add a Settings > Memory tab with destructive `Nuke memory` and `Nuke chats` actions, backed by new main/sidecar bulk-clear IPC flows that preserve surviving local data via index rebuilds.
- feat(frontend-global-stop-shortcut-settings): expose the main-process global agent-stop shortcut in Settings > General, offer platform-safe accelerator choices, persist the selected accelerator locally, apply changes live through the Electron shortcut runtime, and keep onboarding copy aligned with the saved value; add focused renderer/main/IPC regression coverage.

### Refactored
- refactor(frontend-ipc-settings-memory-admin): move renderer/preload IPC channel names to a shared registry, split Settings into extracted General/Memory tab modules plus a dedicated memory action hook, centralize active-chat reset logic for new-chat/delete/clear flows, and move sidecar bulk memory/chat reset orchestration into `memory/admin.py`.

### Fixed
- docs(get-open-windows-focus-clarity): clarify the backend `get_open_windows` tool schema description so listed windows are not implied to be active or focused, and direct callers to use `switch_window` before assuming shortcuts, clicks, or typing will land in that window.
- docs(get-open-windows-description): update the backend `get_open_windows` tool description so it emphasizes listing switchable desktop windows and points callers at `switch_window` as the follow-up action.
- docs(system-prompt-computer-use-focus-sequencing): update the live backend system prompt so computer-use tasks must call `get_open_windows` first and `switch_window` to the intended target before using shortcuts, clicking, or typing; also replace stale `switch_tab` desktop-tool wording in the prompt with `switch_window`.
- refactor(tool-contract-switch-window): rename the desktop window-focus tool from `switch_tab` to `switch_window` across backend catalog exposure, sidecar registration, capture-policy catalogs, and parity/runtime docs so the live contract uses one window-focused name end to end without a legacy alias.
- fix(sidecar-window-list-duplicate-labeling): label duplicate `get_open_windows` display strings with stable ordinal suffixes like ` (1)` and ` (2)` so multiple identical windows remain distinguishable instead of appearing as indistinguishable duplicate rows; update focused sidecar window-tool coverage and docs for the new labeling contract.
- fix(sidecar-window-list-duplicate-switch-targeting): make `switch_tab` understand the numbered duplicate labels emitted by `get_open_windows` and carry the selected underlying window through platform activation so entries like `Google Chrome: New Tab - Google Chrome (2)` no longer fail immediately as unknown labels; add focused sidecar and macOS regression coverage plus runtime doc updates for duplicate-target activation semantics.
- fix(sidecar-window-list-duplicate-titles): stop `get_open_windows` from deduping identical final display strings so multiple real windows with the same app/title combination (for example two Chrome `New Tab` windows) remain visible as separate rows; add focused sidecar regression coverage and refresh the window-tool runtime doc.
- fix(sidecar-macos-switch-tab-app-level-verification): make macOS `switch_tab` treat app-level targets as successful when the active app matches even if the focused window title is more specific than the app name (for example `Finder` -> `Downloads`), aligning success verification with `get_open_windows` entries and adding focused macOS regression coverage for the app-level match path.
- fix(sidecar-macos-quartz-window-fallback): stop macOS `get_open_windows` from promoting unnamed Quartz fallback surfaces to fake app-name windows, so background-only app artifacts no longer appear as switchable windows while real titled Quartz fallback windows like browser tabs, editor windows, and chat windows still remain visible; add focused macOS window-manager coverage for unnamed-surface drops.
- fix(sidecar-runtime-requirements-collapse): remove the split `requirements.runtime.core.txt` / `requirements.runtime.browser.txt` manifests in favor of a single `requirements.runtime.txt`, point the runtime builder and browser feature-pack installer at that unified file, and include `markdownify` in the bundled runtime dependency set.
- fix(sidecar-browser-extract-markdownify-dependency): add missing `markdownify` dependency to the sidecar dev/browser-runtime requirement manifests, require it in browser feature-pack availability checks so stale installs trigger reinstallation, and add focused sidecar coverage for the feature-pack marker contract.
- fix(system-use-open-window-display): make sidecar `get_open_windows` list visible user-facing windows only, format entries as `app: title` when helpful, filter macOS Quartz results down to regular on-screen GUI apps, keep Linux enumeration to visible windows, and preserve macOS `switch_tab` compatibility with the displayed names.
- fix(macos-maximized-window-listing): stop macOS `get_open_windows` from relying on Quartz `onScreenOnly` enumeration, which can miss maximized/full-screen apps, so sidecar window listing still returns user-facing apps like Codex, Ghostty, Spotify, and Zed while keeping helper/background windows filtered out.
- fix(macos-accessibility-window-enumeration): make macOS `get_open_windows` prefer Accessibility `AXWindows`/focused-window APIs for deterministic user-facing window discovery and active-window detection, while filling per-app gaps with Quartz when apps expose no Accessibility windows.
- fix(macos-quartz-nsdictionary-interop): accept PyObjC Quartz `NSDictionary` window records in macOS window enumeration so `get_open_windows`, active-window detection, and `switch_tab` use real Quartz results instead of dropping every record as non-dict and falling back to running-app enumeration.
- fix(macos-quartz-debug-diagnostics): add macOS sidecar `DEBUG` diagnostics for Quartz window enumeration so dev runs show raw/usable counts, filter-drop reasons, and compact sample records when `get_open_windows` falls back to running-app enumeration.
- fix(macos-window-list-logging): add sidecar `INFO` logs for the macOS `get_open_windows` decision path so dev runs show whether Quartz returned usable windows or the runtime fell back to running-app enumeration.
- fix(sidecar-browser-watchdog-noise): downgrade non-fatal browser lifecycle readiness misses from error to warning, stop `DownloadsWatchdog` from synthesizing `NavigationCompleteEvent` during browser-state snapshots, and add focused sidecar regression coverage for the snapshot/PDF auto-download path.
- fix(macos-sidecar-pyobjc-deps): add macOS-only `pyobjc-framework-Cocoa` and `pyobjc-framework-Quartz` to the frontend sidecar dev/runtime requirement files so local dev installs include the window-listing and window-activation dependencies used by macOS `switch_tab` and `get_open_windows`.
- fix(switch-tab-post-capture-pipeline): restore a single shared delayed post-tool capture path so `switch_tab` and bundle execution wait before screenshot/system-state capture on every OS, move bundles back to one final capture after execution completes, harden Windows/macOS window activation by verifying the target window/app actually surfaces before reporting success, and restore macOS `get_open_windows` fallback to running-app enumeration when Quartz window listing is unavailable/empty.
- fix(frontend-chat-pill-close-cap): add a top-mounted hide control to the minimal chat pill, anchor its position to the live send-button x-coordinate so the pill surface grows a small integrated close-cap above that spot, and add focused chat-pill regressions for hide-action wiring while keeping existing send/drag behavior intact.
- fix(backend-websocket-error-sanitization): collapse internal websocket and streamed backend failures to the generic UI-safe message `Internal server error. Start a new chat and try again.`, stop forwarding raw provider/system detail content to the renderer, keep recoverable streamed tool-call parse failures internal to the interaction loop, and add focused backend/frontend regressions plus websocket error-contract doc updates.
- fix(unified-wrapper-canonical-contract): remove legacy `system_use.arguments.explanation` fallback handling across parser/native-bridge/remote-tool/sidecar paths, strip nested wrapper rationale instead of promoting it, and clarify `computer_use` native tool-call shape with an explicit screenshot example plus updated docs/tests.
- fix(sidecar-semantic-retrieval-low-signal-filter): drop existing low-signal semantic rows from prompt injection when they contain only ephemeral/greeting/error facts, so older noisy semantic memories in local databases do not keep reappearing in model context during demos.
- fix(sidecar-semantic-memory-low-signal-write-gate): tighten semantic summarization so only durable facts/preferences/workflows/projects/constraints produce semantic-memory rows, teach the backend summarization prompt to emit `SUMMARY: NONE` when nothing durable qualifies, and mark low-signal episodic batches as processed with semantic-status metadata instead of retrying them forever.
- fix(frontend-prompt-memory-balance): stop prompt-time semantic memories from being starved by shared top-k episodic retrieval by requesting separate episodic/semantic budgets (`4 + 2`) with a semantic similarity floor, wire the new search-memory retrieval params through the local backend bridge, add focused frontend/sidecar regressions, and refresh memory/query contract docs for demo-stable user recall.
- fix(backend-model-facing-tool-call-transparency): preserve the exact LLM-emitted tool payload on successful native/text-parsed tool calls too, so chat tool-call cards show wrapper calls like `computer_use`/`system_use` instead of normalized internal subtools when that is what the model actually generated; add focused parser, bridge, and sender regressions plus updated transparency docs.
- fix(backend-native-system-use-empty-arguments): allow native `system_use` calls with top-level `explanation` and omitted/empty nested `arguments` to normalize correctly, so calls like `get_open_windows` do not fail with a false missing-`explanation` validation error.
- fix(sidecar-macos-screenshot-cursor-overlay): replace the macOS AppKit cursor overlay path with a deterministic repo-owned built-in cursor image and fixed hotspot, so screenshots always include a stable cursor without depending on live `NSCursor` state or freezing transient hover/magnification cursor variants.
- fix(computer-use-mouse-button-contract): align backend mouse-control validation and sidecar execution with the published model-facing schema so `button` is accepted on mouse clicks instead of being rejected before frontend execution.
- fix(backend-preparation-error-guidance): make synthetic pre-dispatch tool failures explain wrapper-shape mistakes instead of surfacing raw `Field required` errors alone, including actionable guidance for malformed `system_use` and `computer_use` calls; add focused backend preparation coverage and refresh tool-preparation/tool-sender docs.
- fix(backend-system-use-model-facing-contract): tighten the model-facing `system_use` contract so prompt guidance and examples explicitly use the `system_use` wrapper for `get_open_windows`, validator whitelist previews show canonical tool names instead of legacy concrete system actions, native/parser legacy direct system calls are canonicalized back into the wrapper envelope, and `open_app` guidance now documents macOS app-name window verification.
- fix(frontend-initial-query-context-no-window-list): stop injecting `all_open_windows` into the default initial query context, keeping only `active_window`, `mouse_position`, and `screen_resolution`; update focused frontend tests and system-state/query-payload docs to match the slimmer prompt contract.
- fix(frontend-browser-automation-onboarding-warmup): make the browser-automation onboarding/settings grant run a real dedicated `browser connect` warm-up after runtime verification, opening the WindieOS browser for sign-in/profile setup before the first real browser task; refresh permission-manifest docs and focused permission/onboarding regressions.
- fix(sidecar-macos-screenshot-monitor-capture): make macOS monitor-targeted screenshots use direct bounded capture instead of full-desktop crop when display bounds are present, preserving full-monitor captures on Retina displays without breaking Windows/Linux monitor routing or coordinate grounding.
- fix(backend-coordinate-test-boundary): align coordinate-scaling sidecar-parity tests with the real preparer sanitization boundary so helper-level grounding metadata checks and executor-shape validation no longer conflict.
- fix(frontend-macos-launcher-noise): filter Chromium's known macOS `SetApplicationIsDaemon ... paramErr` child-process stderr warning in the Electron launcher so real startup/runtime errors stay visible during `npm run electron` and `npm run electron:dev`; add focused launcher coverage and refresh sidecar/launcher architecture docs.
- fix(frontend-overlay-startup-hidden): make shared overlay BrowserWindows start hidden by default so chat/response surfaces do not briefly materialize during startup before the dashboard handoff, reducing macOS startup-window churn and aligning runtime behavior with the lazy overlay contract.
- fix(frontend-macos-overlay-panel-policy): switch macOS chat/response overlays from invalid `toolbar` windows to native `panel` windows and stop calling `setVisibleOnAllWorkspaces(...)` on macOS overlays, avoiding the remaining `SetApplicationIsDaemon` startup warning path while preserving Windows/Linux overlay policy.
- fix(frontend-macos-overlay-process-type-warning): stop passing macOS overlay windows through `skipTransformProcessType` when pinning them across workspaces/fullscreen spaces, matching Electron's foreground-app contract and avoiding the startup `SetApplicationIsDaemon` warning path; refresh overlay runtime docs and focused main-process regressions.
- fix(frontend-onboarding-stop-shortcut-keycap-clipping): render the onboarding stop-shortcut hint as separate keycaps instead of one oversized pill so long labels like `Command + Shift + Esc` stay fully visible on the final slide; add focused slideshow regression coverage and refresh the onboarding runtime reference.
- fix(backend-system-prompt-explicit-tool-routing): update the backend system prompt so explicit user instructions to use `computer_use`/control the computer or to use the Windie browser/`browser` tool override the default tool-selection preference; add prompt-manager coverage to pin that routing guidance.
- fix(frontend-global-stop-shortcut-fallback-and-status): make the main-process global stop shortcut try supported platform accelerators in order, persist the first working fallback locally, include shortcut runtime status in IPC snapshots, and surface fallback/registration-failure notices in Settings; add focused runtime, IPC bridge, app-config, and Settings regressions.
- fix(frontend-chatbox-response-overlay-transcript): keep the minimal response overlay visible once the current turn has content, append streamed assistant `llm-text` continuously, append tool-call `explanation` arguments as additional transcript lines, and stop falling back to the typing indicator after tool phases; add focused response-overlay regressions and refresh overlay/user docs.
- fix(frontend-chatbox-auto-screenshot-toggle): make the minimal chat pill camera button a blue-on-by-default `include_query_screenshot` toggle instead of an immediate capture action, so overlay sends auto-capture on submit only when the toggle is enabled; refresh overlay/send docs and focused chatbox regressions.
- fix(fullstack-computer-use-backend-dispatch-validation): make backend `ToolPreparer` revalidate model-emitted tool args before frontend dispatch and revalidate resolved computer-use executor payloads after coordinate grounding, preventing malformed native `computer_use` calls from reaching sidecar runtimes with missing `action`/coordinate fields; align keyboard `repeat`/`interval_ms` and window `match_mode` contracts across backend, sidecar schemas, runtimes, docs, and focused regressions.
- fix(backend-invalid-computer-use-raw-history-preservation): preserve the original provider-normalized invalid `computer_use` payload in `model_facing_tool_call` and assistant history `tool_calls` so follow-up LLM turns can see the exact malformed wrapper they emitted while execution still fails closed as `invalid_computer_use_tool`; add focused backend regressions and refresh bridge/history/sender docs.
- fix(frontend-windows-dashboard-activation): strengthen the dashboard show-main-window handoff by raising the frameless main window and focusing both the native window and renderer after the chat-pill transition, preventing Windows from leaving the dashboard visible but non-interactive when opened from the minimal chat pill.
- fix(frontend-windows-electron-dev-stdout): pipe Electron stdout through the dev launcher instead of relying on direct console inheritance so Windows `npm run electron:dev` once again shows main-process `console.log` output in the terminal; add focused launcher coverage for stdout forwarding.
- fix(frontend-windows-titlebar-hit-testing): harden the custom minimize/maximize/close controls by forcing the full control strip out of the frameless drag region, keeping icon SVGs from stealing pointer targets, and raising the controls above adjacent header content so Windows titlebar buttons stop becoming intermittently unclickable.
- fix(frontend-windows-global-stop-shortcut): move the Windows-only global agent-stop shortcut off the reserved Task Manager binding to `Ctrl + Alt + .`, while keeping the existing `Command/Ctrl + Shift + Esc` shortcut on macOS and Linux; update the renderer shortcut labels and onboarding runtime docs to match.
- fix(frontend-typing-indicator-reduced-motion): keep the chatbox and inline awaiting typing indicators animated under OS reduced-motion preferences by switching them to opacity-only pulses instead of fully disabling them, restoring visible â€śassistant is workingâ€ť feedback on Windows setups with animation effects turned off.
- fix(frontend-windows-dev-entrypoints): add a Windows-native `bin/docs-list.cmd` wrapper so the docs index helper no longer triggers the app chooser in PowerShell, document the Windows fallback commands, and refresh frontend setup/troubleshooting guidance for cross-OS Electron reinstall issues that surface as `spawn ...\node_modules\electron\dist\electron ENOENT`.
- fix(frontend-onboarding-actions-viewport-access): cap the frontend onboarding card to the viewport, move slide content into an internal scroll region, keep footer actions pinned outside the scroll area, and add a focused frontend regression for the new layout contract.
- fix(frontend-onboarding-permission-density): tighten typography and spacing on the permissions slide so the standard onboarding permission set fits more often on typical desktop window heights while preserving the internal-scroll fallback.
- fix(frontend-onboarding-permission-grid): render the permissions slide in a two-column grid on wide desktop windows so the current six-item permission manifest is less likely to require scrolling, while keeping the existing single-column fallback on narrower widths.
- fix(repo-committer-helper): restore the missing executable `scripts/committer` helper so macOS contributors can make scoped path-only commits with the documented repo workflow.
- fix(backend-macos-deps): pin macOS backend OCR runtime dependencies to the verified compatible stack (`numpy<2`, `onnxruntime==1.24.3`, `opencv-python<4.10`), realign the macOS `openai` constraint with the backend LiteLLM requirement, and update backend setup docs to install `backend/requirements_mac.txt` on macOS so fresh backend environments avoid dependency-resolution and NumPy/ONNX/OpenCV incompatibility paths.
- fix(frontend-linux-electron-startup-noise): stop creating overlay windows with Linux `type="toolbar"` so Electron no longer emits the `_NET_WM_WINDOW_TYPE_TOOLBAR` startup warning, and make the dev Electron launcher drop the one known harmless Chromium `StartTransientUnit ... UnitExists` stderr line while preserving all other stderr output; add focused frontend regressions and refresh the overlay/launcher docs.
- fix(frontend-sidecar-system-browser-first-packaging): stop bundling Playwright Chromium into the packaged sidecar runtime, remove packaged-launch `PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH` injection, prefer system-installed Chrome/Chromium-family browsers before any Playwright cache fallback, refresh browser-install permission copy/docs, and add focused frontend+sidecar regressions for the new packaged runtime behavior.
- fix(frontend-windows-macos-capture-noop): make renderer screenshot surface visibility a true no-op on Windows/macOS so protected overlays rely on content protection instead of chat-pill hide/show, while preserving the existing Linux hide/restore path and adding focused surface-orchestrator regressions for both contracts.
- refactor(frontend-permissions-runtime-model): split OS permissions vs app capabilities vs resource/runtime checks in the desktop permission manifest/UI, replace session-only grant memory with async startup re-probes plus persisted workspace access state, stop opening Windows privacy settings for screen capture onboarding, and add focused permission/onboarding regressions for the new model.
- fix(fullstack-shared-tool-schema-parity): align sidecar shared tool schemas with backend strict contracts (required `wait.seconds`, direct-tool explanations, `run_in_background`, numeric bounds, and `extra='forbid'`), make sidecar wait runtime reject missing `seconds`, add a non-browser backend/sidecar schema parity suite with explicit exception coverage, and refresh the related tool-contract docs.
- fix(backend-keyboard-control-validation): enforce action-specific `keyboard_control` backend schema validation (`text` for `type`/`paste`, `key` for `press`, `keys` for `hotkey`, plus 10000-char limit) so invalid `computer_use` keyboard calls fail before frontend dispatch; add focused backend regressions and refresh the computer-tool contract doc.

### Refactored
- refactor(frontend-screenshot-attachment-state): introduce a shared screenshot attachment normalizer for artifact-ref/url fallback, inline payload parsing, and transcript artifact inference; rewire stream tool-output rows, tool-runner messages, screenshot capture, and episodic-memory replay to use the same attachment rules; and add focused frontend coverage for the shared screenshot-state contract.
- refactor(frontend-tool-call-and-bundle-runtime-models): introduce a shared `toolCallMessageState` normalizer for live stream, transcript serialization, and historical replay; move bundled tool result typing/status/error derivation into `BundleExecutionModel`; and centralize app startup routing behind `selectStartupSurface()` so renderer startup decisions no longer live as duplicated inline conditions.
- refactor(frontend-onboarding-wizard-boundaries): split the onboarding slideshow into dedicated permission/shortcut slide components, extract pure slide-state derivation plus a permission-action hook, move browser-automation post-grant config updates into a shared helper, and replace the single-card wizard's ad hoc width caps with explicit onboarding CSS tokens while removing the old multi-grid selector overlap.
- refactor(frontend-chat-pill-flow-and-logging): extract pure main-process response-overlay visibility policy helpers and renderer chat-pill session/view contracts, wire the existing send/overlay runtime through those shared seams without changing behavior, and add gated `[ChatPillTrace][main|renderer]` logs plus focused contract tests/docs so later minimal-pill debugging stops depending on scattered ad hoc conditions.
- refactor(frontend-chatbox-toggle-controls): consolidate the minimal chat pill's config-backed toggle plumbing behind one shared boolean-config helper and one shared enabled-state icon style, reducing duplicated button logic while preserving the same camera/TTS behavior.
- refactor(frontend-main-runtime-ownership): centralize dashboard/chat/response lifecycle ownership in `surface_runtime.cjs`, move overlay/content-protection/activation rules into `window_platform_policy.cjs`, shrink `index.cjs` to composition wiring, and give local-backend/wakeword bridges explicit supervisor-owned subprocess state.

## 0.6.10 - 2026-03-09

Includes the last 300 commits on `main`.

### Added
- chore(release): bump packaged desktop app version to `0.6.10` and trigger the cross-platform desktop release workflow for macOS, Windows, and Linux.
- fix(frontend-dev-compaction-model-sync): sync the currently selected dashboard provider/model into the backend session immediately before manual dev compaction rehydrate/compact requests so compaction uses the active header model instead of a stale prior selection.
- fix(backend-compaction-summary-preview): stop shortening `context-compaction-completed.summary_preview` in manual and auto compaction paths so dev compaction UI receives the full backend summary preview string; add focused backend regressions and refresh compaction formatter/docs wording.
- refactor(backend-compaction-structured-rendering): make history compaction render message-type-aware transcripts instead of flattening everything to `Role: content`, strip XML-heavy user/tool wrapper blocks, preserve both early and recent compacted context under budget, and strengthen compaction prompt instructions around exact identifiers and confirmed-vs-preview-only state.
- feat(backend-tool-history-compaction-facts): preserve bounded structured `compaction_facts` plus `tool_name` on tool-result history rows so compaction can retain refs, URLs, actions, and failure metadata from rich tool payloads instead of only free-text `llm_content`; add focused backend coverage for tool-result extraction/history rehydrate behavior.
- fix(backend-compaction-output-token-budget): wire `history_compaction_summary_max_tokens` through the shared LLM request path (`max_output_tokens` / provider `max_tokens`) including OpenAI Responses-native reasoning, and add backend regressions for compaction request kwargs plus provider request-param forwarding.
- docs(backend-compaction-history-facts): extend backend history/tool-result/core-message deep references so `compaction_facts`, structured tool-output storage, and compaction-only metadata boundaries are documented at the transformer -> committer -> history layers in addition to the compaction engine note.
- feat(fullstack-anthropic-gemini-reasoning-modes): add low/high Anthropic and Gemini thinking variants to the curated online model catalog so chat header reasoning-mode dropdowns appear for those model families, wire selected-variant thinking budgets through provider-native request params, and extend backend/frontend regression coverage for model-option grouping and provider request payload behavior.
- fix(sidecar-browser-role-refs): preserve role refs such as `e12` through the canonical browser adapter path for `click`, `input`, `upload_file`, `dropdown_options`, and `select_dropdown` by routing those actions through controller-backed locator resolution instead of collapsing them to Browser Use numeric indices; add focused sidecar regression coverage and refresh browser schema/control docs.
- feat(frontend-chat-model-selector-reasoning-mode-split): split chat header model controls so model dropdown shows one base entry per runtime model family (for example one GPT-5.3 Codex row) while a conditional reasoning-mode dropdown (`Low`, `Medium`, `High`, `Extra High`) appears for models with multiple reasoning variants and rewrites `selected_model_id` to the matching variant id.
- feat(frontend-dev-compaction): extend dev-only compaction debugging so `npm run electron:dev` shows the full replacement history artifact after compaction, including the summary message and every kept tail message with full untruncated content.
- fix(sidecar-browser-scroll-watchdog-timeouts): harden browser_use scroll handling by bounding individual CDP scroll steps, aligning page-scroll fallbacks with the actor path (`mouseWheel` -> `synthesizeScrollGesture` -> `window.scrollBy`), and raising a real browser error only after all strategies fail; add focused sidecar regression coverage and refresh the watchdog runtime reference.
- refactor(backend-history): remove count-based history pruning and config-driven loop caps so `ConversationHistory` no longer slices by message count, `InteractionLoop` no longer stops on `max_agent_iterations`, and compaction is the only history-reduction mechanism; update backend tests/docs accordingly.
- fix(frontend-permissions-macos-microphone-onboarding): make microphone Grant on macOS trigger a renderer `getUserMedia({audio:true})` fallback when native prompt path does not register the app, wire that bridge through main/IPC permission runtime, add mac build metadata (`NSMicrophoneUsageDescription`) plus audio-input entitlements, and add focused permission-service regression coverage so WindieOS appears in the OS microphone permission flow.
- refactor(sidecar-memory): centralize transcript-vs-interaction record-kind constants in `memory/record_kinds.py` and rename completed-turn interaction persistence helpers so sidecar memory code no longer overloads generic â€śepisodicâ€ť naming for transcript rows vs Episodic Memory entries.
- refactor(backend-llm): share Anthropic/Gemini provider-native `thinking` request-param logic in `provider_native_reasoning.py`, keeping provider-specific thought/text extraction behavior intact while removing duplicate enable/disable policy code.
- refactor(sidecar-keyboard-key-normalization): centralize `keyboard_control` key normalization into one OS-aware helper so `press` and `hotkey` share the same alias rules, including platform-correct `SUPER` handling on Linux/Windows vs macOS; add focused sidecar regression coverage and refresh the sidecar keyboard runtime reference.
- refactor(frontend-permissions-linux): hoist Linux permission-center command maps in `permission_service.cjs` to shared module-level constants, alias `screen_capture`/`microphone` through one privacy-command set instead of rebuilding duplicate arrays per call, and add focused permission-service coverage that asserts the Linux microphone flow still opens the privacy settings path.
- refactor(backend-rehydrate): extract pending tool-call queue + fallback tool-output synthesis into `rehydrate_tool_linkage_repair.py` so transcript row normalization stays focused on per-entry parsing while keeping strict-provider resume repairs test-backed.
- chore(release): bump packaged desktop app version to `0.6.9` for the new cross-platform desktop release tag.
- fix(test-settings-load): align backend `load-settings` handler expectation with current config payload by asserting `browser_automation_enabled`.
- fix(frontend-lint): remove unused chat IPC imports and stale onboarding store destructuring so release lint runs pass cleanly.
- docs(system-prompt-open-app-guidance): update backend system prompt with explicit `open_app` tool-selection/rules guidance and add a one-shot `open_app` example call for detached GUI app launches; add prompt-manager assertions so this guidance remains pinned.
- fix(agent-prompt-native-input-fallback): teach the runtime system prompt that `keyboard_control` is synthetic automation input rather than trusted native hardware keyboard control, framed as general decision guidance for shortcut/key recorders and similar native-input capture surfaces; lock the prompt contract/docs to that guidance.
- fix(backend-tool-selection-open-app): include `open_app` in `backend/dev/tool_selection.toml` allowlist so chat-mode runtime tool schemas expose the dedicated app-launch tool (`computer_use`, `system_use`, `open_app`, `process`) instead of filtering it out.
- docs(system-prompt-stop-hotkey): add an explicit global emergency-stop note to the backend system prompt so the agent is aware `Command/Ctrl+Shift+Escape` immediately terminates active loops, and lock it with prompt-manager contract coverage.
- fix(sidecar-keyboard-super-alias): map `SUPER` hotkey input to pyautogui's Linux `win` key name so system/app shortcuts no longer silently drop the modifier, and add focused sidecar regression coverage for the alias.
- fix(frontend-permissions): remove the no-op `planned_system_access` onboarding permission from the shared manifest and main-process permission service, stop gating onboarding completion on a hidden consent flag, bump the manifest version so stored onboarding state re-evaluates cleanly, and update onboarding/permission docs plus focused renderer/main tests to match the trimmed permission surface.
- refactor(packaging-and-browser-runtime): removed slim/core+browser sidecar packaging profiles in favor of one full bundled runtime build path, simplified desktop release workflow inputs/scripts/docs to that single path, and added browser-permission runtime behavior that checks for an existing Chromium binary, prompts for user consent when missing, and installs Playwright Chromium on approval.
- feat(fullstack-browser-automation-opt-in-gating): added frontend-managed `browser_automation_enabled` config wiring and backend tool-policy/schema filtering so `browser` is hidden until explicitly enabled, rewired onboarding permission step 1 to use an `Enable` flow for browser automation (with capability-check feedback instead of OS-permission prompts), and expanded backend/frontend regression coverage plus config/tool-policy docs for the new opt-in behavior.
- fix(backend-rehydrate): repair malformed past tool-turn history during chat rehydrate by tracking all pending tool-call ids, reusing explicit ids when tool outputs arrive out of order, and synthesizing missing tool outputs for unanswered calls so strict providers can continue reopened chats.
- fix(frontend-dashboard-autoscroll-follow-guard): keep dashboard transcript auto-follow active across post-send awaiting/thinking/layout growth by only disabling follow on real upward scrolling, auto-following late list resizes while the loop is active, and treating assistant thinking-text expansion as an autoscroll-worthy live update; added focused renderer regression coverage for false scroll-up deactivation and resize-driven follow behavior.
- fix(backend-tool-wait-timeouts): make backend wait-for-tool/wait-for-bundle timeouts adaptive for foreground `run_shell_command` calls by honoring extended `terminate_after_seconds` (plus shell post-action wait buffer), aggregating shell-step budgets for bundles with a bounded cap, and adding execution-layer regression coverage for adaptive/default/capped timeout paths.
- docs(planning-billing-token-attribution): extend `docs/planning/billing_and_usage.md` with a row-level token attribution plan that distinguishes request-level provider truth from transcript-row display, documents provider-specific preflight counting paths for OpenAI and Anthropic input rows, and defines output attribution rules for assistant-only, tool-only, and mixed tool/text turns.
- fix(ci-release): resolve desktop signing mode dynamically in `desktop-release.yml` so tag-triggered Windows/macOS packaging falls back to unsigned builds when signing/notarization secrets are absent, instead of failing before packaging and release publication.
- chore(release): bump the packaged desktop app to `0.6.8`, refresh the model-facing prompt/schema snapshots, and update the local audit report before publishing the next tagged release.
- fix(frontend-dashboard-scroll): force the dashboard transcript list to jump back to the bottom when a newly sent user message is appended, then continue using the existing bottom-stick rules for tool/assistant auto-follow so manual upward scrolling still disables follow until the user returns to the bottom.
- refactor(backend-memory-persistence): extract explicit post-terminal query-stream policy into `query_execution_terminal_policy.py`, move completed-turn publish + interaction-memory emission into `completion_side_effects.py`, add an executor-level regression proving successful turns emit `MemoryStoreEvent`, and add a planning TODO note for transcript-vs-interaction persistence ownership.
- fix(backend-memory-store): preserve backend `memory-store` events after `streaming-complete` by allowing that post-terminal side-effect through `QueryExecutionService`, so completed user+assistant turns now create `record_kind='interaction'` episodic rows instead of only transcript rows; added focused backend regression coverage and refreshed memory persistence docs.
- fix(frontend-global-stop-shortcut): register a main-process global `Esc` shortcut only while the agent loop is active, route it through the existing `stop-query` websocket path, and seed the current conversation ref as soon as a query is sent so stop works even before the first backend chunk arrives; added focused runtime + IPC lifecycle regressions for dynamic shortcut enable/disable and composition-layer option pass-through.
- fix(frontend-global-stop-shortcut-accelerator): update the main-process global stop accelerator to `CommandOrControl+Shift+Escape` (instead of bare `Escape`) to reduce OS/app conflicts, while preserving focused-window in-app `Escape` stop behavior.
- fix(frontend-onboarding-stop-shortcut-label): update onboarding step 2 to display the global stop shortcut label (`Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + Esc`) so onboarding guidance matches the new main-process accelerator.
- fix(frontend-dashboard-stop-shortcut): switch the dashboard/chat stop shortcut to `Esc` so active agent loops can be cancelled from the keyboard with the same stop path as the stop button, and consume the event before other dashboard `Escape` listeners run.
- fix(frontend-dashboard-autoscroll): limit dashboard auto-follow to live agent-loop assistant/tool progression so tool calls, tool outputs, and assistant streaming/final replies keep the dashboard pinned only while the user remains at the bottom, while manual upward scrolling disables follow until the user scrolls back down.
- test(backend-prompts): align `test_prompt_manager` with the current repo prompt structure by asserting the active tool-policy sections and current execution-status wording, so full backend pytest runs track the real prompt contract instead of the removed `<tool_protocol>` tag.
- test(frontend-surface-orchestrator): align surface-orchestrator capture/tool-runner suites with the current screenshot handoff contract by updating `get-main-window-visibility` IPC expectations, asserting `hiddenSurface` in preparation payloads, and resetting capture lifecycle state between tests so full frontend Jest runs stay green without changing runtime behavior.
- fix(frontend-dev-ui-provider-token-badge): attach backend `token-count` payloads to the completed assistant message for the matching turn and prefer provider-reported token usage in dev message badges over local estimation when available, while preserving estimation fallback for user and tool rows; add focused renderer regressions for per-message token-count attachment and provider badge formatting.
- refactor(repo-jscpd): remove new duplicate helper blocks introduced during the grounding and OpenAI Responses cleanup by trimming redundant facade imports and consolidating repeated Responses-param assembly, keeping repo-wide `jscpd` noise limited to the unrelated Anthropic/Gemini provider files already dirty in the workspace.
- refactor(backend-openai-responses): split the Responses-native runtime into input-shaping and payload/stream helper modules while keeping the provider-facing entry points unchanged, so tool-call replay, final payload parsing, and reasoning event extraction are isolated behind smaller tested helpers.
- refactor(backend-computer-grounding): extract shared source/destination grounding builders and validators for `mouse_control`/`scroll_control`, split generic source normalization from mouse drag-destination preparation behind a thin `preparation_helper` facade, and add payload-level parity coverage proving backend-prepared grounded tool calls validate against the sidecar runtime schemas.
- refactor(computer-use): remove `scroll` from `mouse_control` across backend schemas, unified `computer_use`, and sidecar execution so scrolling only flows through `scroll_control`; updated focused backend/sidecar tests and computer-tool docs while intentionally leaving the system prompt untouched.
- fix(backend-openai-responses-input): normalize assistant tool-call history in both internal and OpenAI-shaped forms before building Responses API `function_call` items so post-tool follow-up turns do not send empty `input[*].name` fields; added focused backend regression coverage for normalized assistant tool-call replay after tool execution.
- refactor(backend-computer-use-schema): rename model-facing mouse prediction fields from overloaded `description`/`drag_to_description` to `source_description`/`destination_description`, update drag-destination normalization to reuse the renamed destination field through shared screenshot grounding, and refresh focused backend tests/docs so provider prompts, schema filtering, and validation errors all reflect the new breaking contract.
- fix(backend-openai-responses-stream-finalization): normalize enum-backed LiteLLM Responses stream event types before dispatch so thinking-capable OpenAI models like `gpt-5.3-codex@@gpt-5-3-codex-fast-thinking` recognize `response.completed`, capture the final payload correctly, and no longer fail with `stream completed without a final response payload`; added focused backend regression coverage for enum-typed stream events and revalidated with a live OpenAI stream smoke.
- feat(backend-llm-provider-native-reasoning): add provider-native reasoning support for Anthropic, Gemini, and thinking-capable OpenAI presets by sending provider-native thinking request params, extracting Anthropic/Gemini native thought content, routing OpenAI reasoning models through the Responses API runtime, updating model metadata to advertise reasoning-text streaming, and adding focused backend regressions for provider routing, reasoning extraction, and stream payload normalization.
- refactor(fullstack-audit-driven-dedupe-and-export-surface-cleanup): removed private CJS helper exports from display-affinity/window-visibility/overlay runtime modules and rewired tests through public APIs, added shared backend string-normalization helpers for unified `system_use` explanation handling, collapsed duplicated unified-tool normalization/collapse logic in parser/registry/bridge paths, and revalidated with green `knip`, `jscpd` (`0` clones), `lint:audit`, targeted frontend suites, targeted backend suites, and backend route clone scan (`0`).
- refactor(fullstack-model-facing-tool-schema-prompt-guidance-split): slim model-facing `computer_use`/`system_use`/`browser` schema descriptions to contract-focused text, hide browser compatibility-only fields (`mode`, `cdp_url`, `profile`, `node`, `target`) from the backend browser schema projection, move grounding/timing/verification and shell/browser strategy guidance into the backend global system prompt, and refresh backend/sidecar/docs regression coverage for the new prompt-vs-schema boundary.
- fix(backend-thinking-events): stop `ToolOrchestrator` from emitting synthetic `ThinkingEvent("Executing N tool(s)...")` placeholders so `llm-thought` only reflects provider-native reasoning output; add direct orchestrator regression coverage and update tool-turn orchestration docs to remove the stale event-contract claim.
- feat(fullstack-mouse-control-drag-destination-grounding): extend drag actions so source and destination can each use `manual`, `ocr`, or `prediction` grounding, resolve both endpoints against the same screenshot frame, emit separate source/destination coordinate contracts, and normalize both endpoints into desktop coordinates before sidecar execution.
- fix(fullstack-mouse-control-drag-contract): align backend schemas, backend coordinate normalization, and sidecar execution so `mouse_control` drag actions require `drag_to_x/drag_to_y`, normalize both source and destination coordinates against the current screenshot frame, honor requested drag duration, and execute drag from source to destination instead of dragging to the source point.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-tool-call-card-metadata-visibility): render tool-call metadata directly in visible tool-call/bundle card JSON (while excluding duplicated `model_facing_tool_call` envelope data), so required computer-use rationale fields (`description`, `explanation`, `expectation`) are visible without opening Details; add formatter regression coverage for single-call, parse-failure, and bundle metadata display contracts.
- fix(frontend-screenshot-active-surface-hide): hide the active WindieOS surface (`chatbox` or `main-window`) before screenshot capture and restore that same surface afterward, preventing dashboard-originated screenshot/tool flows from capturing the visible dashboard; add focused main-process + surface-orchestrator regressions for active-surface prep/restore symmetry.
- fix(frontend-screenshot-dashboard-fade-frame): force dashboard opacity to `0` before hide and restore opacity on later dashboard shows so compositor fade animations cannot leak the dashboard into screenshot captures after screenshot-tool execution.
- fix(frontend-screenshot-dashboard-minimize-gate): make dashboard-originated screenshot prep minimize the dashboard and wait until the main window is actually minimized or hidden before capture proceeds, removing the remaining race between screenshot execution and dashboard hide animation.
- fix(frontend-screenshot-dashboard-offscreen-suppression): move the dashboard offscreen before hide during screenshot prep and wait for offscreen/hidden suppression instead of trusting compositor minimize animation timing, then restore saved bounds on later dashboard shows.
- docs(frontend-chat-interface-control-surface-reference): add a dedicated renderer chat reference for `ChatInterface` and `ChatInterfaceHeaderControls` covering provider/model selection reconciliation, stop-query handling, main-window sender-surface ownership, transport warning behavior, and manual compaction pre-rehydrate flow.
- docs(frontend-renderer-response-selection-and-fixed-overlay-contract-refresh): replace stale `ChatBoxResponse` docs that referenced removed auto-resize and `chatBoxResponseUtils` helpers with current fixed-height response-pill/runtime sizing contracts, add a dedicated `latestVisibleAssistantReply` turn-boundary/allowed-type reference, and rewire renderer/chat/overlay docs hubs and related-page links to current module ownership.
- docs(backend-llm-toolcallschema-normalization-reference): add a dedicated backend LLM deep reference for `ToolCallSchema` extraction (`parser_types.py`) covering strict `functionCall` shape acceptance, unified `computer_use`/`system_use` normalization, metadata promotion boundaries, explanation precedence, and deep-copy immutability; wire links from backend LLM hubs and parser trust-boundary docs.
- docs(frontend-memory-retrieval-pairing-contract): add a dedicated cross-layer memory retrieval contract page for main-process memory-tag injection, sidecar episodic grouping + transcript pair synthesis fallback, and backend `user_query_raw` extraction boundaries; wire links across sidecar/main/contracts/backend runtime references.
- docs(architecture-runtime-identity-naming-alignment): update core architecture and backend/frontend integration docs to use WindieOS runtime naming instead of stale "Desktop Assistant" phrasing in system ownership descriptions.
- docs(frontend-display-affinity-helper-contract-clarification): document visible-surface affinity sync helpers (`resolveVisibleSurfaceDisplayAffinity` / `syncVisibleSurfaceDisplayAffinity`) and hidden-window target fallback helper semantics (`resolveShowTargetDisplayAffinity`) across main lifecycle and window visibility references.
- docs(frontend-display-affinity-wrapper-routing-alignment): align local-backend and IPC ownership references with `resolveActiveSurfaceDisplayAffinityForWindows(...)` wrapper routing (sender + `getWindows()` adapter) for screenshot bounds and show-chatbox/show-main-window target monitor resolution.
- docs(frontend-external-focus-title-marker-clarification): clarify external-focus tracker window-title markers by documenting `windieos` as current runtime identity and `desktop assistant` as legacy compatibility marker.
- fix(frontend-query-payload-screenshot-ref-normalization): normalize `ApiClient.sendQuery` screenshot fields (`screenshot_ref`, `screenshot_url`, `screenshot_refs`) with trim/drop semantics so whitespace-only values never reach backend payloads; add direct `ApiClient` contract tests plus multi-screenshot chat-stream attachment normalization regressions.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-screenshot-ref-whitespace-normalization): normalize backend `tool-output` screenshot attachment refs/urls in `chatStreamEventUtils` so whitespace-only `screenshot_ref`/`screenshot_url` no longer produce broken artifact links or suppress inline screenshot fallback; add deterministic utility + tool-handler regressions.
- test(fullstack-tool-bundle-malformed-tools-tolerance): add backend `ToolBundleEventFormatter` compatibility coverage for non-list `tools` passthrough and frontend chat-stream regressions proving `tool-bundle` malformed/null `tools` payloads fail closed to `tools: []` without crashing or writing transcript tool-call rows.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-tool-bundle-malformed-tools-guard): normalize `formatToolBundlePayload` to treat non-array `payload.tools` as empty so malformed backend `tool-bundle` events cannot throw during renderer formatting, and add regression coverage in `ChatStreamFormatting.test.ts`.
- test(fullstack-tool-output-malformed-stream-contract): add frontend `useChatStreamToolHandlers` regressions for malformed `tool-output` payload safety (no-throw/state reset/correlation fallback) plus remote-screenshot precedence over inline screenshots, and add backend formatter coverage that preserves `tool-output.payload.metadata.request_id` for frontend correlation fallback paths.
- test(fullstack-ipc-tool-lifecycle-malformed-payload-guards): add backend websocket parse-runtime regressions for malformed `tool-result`/`tool-bundle-result` payload shapes and frontend tool-runner regressions that fail closed on malformed bundle/tool payloads (including non-array bundle tools) while preserving stable no-execution behavior.
- docs(sidecar-and-backend-system-use-trim-normalization-detail): refine sidecar tool-catalog/registry and backend `system_use` wrapper contract docs with explicit explanation trim + whitespace-ignore semantics across wrapper routing and delegation.
- docs(backend-system-use-and-browser-projection-detail-refinement): refine backend parser/native-bridge/remote-tool contract docs with explicit `system_use` explanation trim semantics and enumerated `RemoteBrowserTool.get_json_schema(...)` action/property projection filters for better cross-layer debugging precision.
- docs(frontend-window-visibility-active-display-fallback): refresh frontend main lifecycle/window visibility/display-affinity inventory docs to document hidden-window monitor targeting fallback (`showChatWindow`/`showMainWindow` reuse stored active display affinity when no explicit target is provided).
- docs(frontend-ipc-display-affinity-reconnect-continuity): update frontend main/protocol state/testing/error references to document that websocket close/session reset clears backend identity refs but preserves active display affinity for reconnect-time screenshot/main-window monitor continuity.
- docs(backend-system-prompt-identity-directive-surface): document the literal `system_prompt.txt` runtime identity and main-window-title directives (`windieos`) in the backend prompt lifecycle reference so prompt-contract docs stay aligned with active backend prompt text.
- docs(frontend-wakeword-helper-and-system-use-shell-contract-alignment): refresh frontend inventory/protocol/IPC and local-backend deep references to include `wakeword_bridge_runtime.cjs` ownership in wakeword surfaces and document wrapper-aware `system_use -> run_shell_command` `sudo_auth_mode` injection semantics (including non-object nested-arguments pass-through for sidecar validation ownership).
- fix(fullstack-system-use-shell-sudo-auth-propagation): inject `sudo_auth_mode` into frontend `system_use -> run_shell_command` arguments so full-sudo configuration propagates through unified wrapper flows, with deterministic backend parser + sidecar registry + frontend bridge regression coverage for explanation precedence and non-object argument validation boundaries.
- test(fullstack-cancel-and-toolrunner-error-recovery): add deterministic backend/frontend regressions for cancellation recovery by asserting `QueryExecutionService.execute` re-raises `CancelledError` while reconciling pending tool calls, and ensuring renderer tool-runner drops correlated backend payloads after execution failure untracks the request.
- test(fullstack-terminal-stream-gates-regressions): add deterministic backend/frontend regressions that lock terminal handoff behavior by ignoring same-turn packets during frontend `error` pending handoff and suppressing backend post-error stream events (including late `streaming-complete`) without emitting fallback completion.
- docs(frontend-runtime-paths-and-sidecar-protocol-wakeword-helper-scope): refresh runtime-paths and sidecar services/protocol hubs to include `wakeword_bridge_runtime.cjs` in canonical module scope and add wakeword startup/readiness debug guidance tied to helper-level error/status handling.
- fix(frontend-display-affinity): write active display affinity immediately when opening the dashboard onto an explicit target display, so monitor fallback updates from the chosen open target even before Electron show/move events fire.
- fix(frontend-display-affinity): eagerly sync display affinity inside `showChatWindow`, `showMainWindow`, and manual chat-pill drag handling so active-monitor fallback updates immediately from control flow instead of depending on asynchronous Electron show/move event ordering.
- fix(frontend-display-affinity): sync fallback display affinity from visible dashboard/chat/response window show+move events so no-sender screenshot paths inherit the monitor of the last real visible WindieOS surface instead of only the last query-origin affinity; added main-window/bootstrap/display-affinity regressions for the new event-driven sync.
- test(frontend-display-affinity): add RPC regression coverage for wrapped `computer_use -> screenshot` requests so hidden-sender screenshot execution still inherits the visible chat-surface monitor bounds end to end.
- fix(frontend-display-affinity): resolve screenshot monitor bounds from the live visible chat/dashboard surface before falling back to stored query-origin affinity, so hidden dashboard tool execution during chat-pill sessions follows the monitor the user is currently using; added display-bounds regressions for hidden-sender plus visible-chat fallback.
- fix(frontend-display-affinity): inject active-monitor screenshot bounds into unified `computer_use` screenshot arguments so sidecar screenshot requests no longer bypass the single-monitor crop path and fall back to full-desktop capture; added nested wrapper regression coverage in `LocalBackendBridgeToolArgs.test.cjs`.
- test(fullstack-tool-lifecycle-and-completion-contract-regressions): add deterministic backend/sidecar/frontend regressions for `system_use` explanation precedence (top-level over nested fallback), tool-result routing storage isolation and inline-screenshot precedence, empty completion backfill suppression, and renderer tool-result payload normalization precedence (`screenshot_ref` over inline screenshot plus camelCase system-state fallback normalization).
- docs(frontend-main-wakeword-helper-reference): add a dedicated Electron-main deep reference for `wakeword_bridge_runtime.cjs` helper contracts (stderr status parsing/noisy-log suppression, startup/process error mapping, audio-chunk normalization), and wire links from frontend/main hubs plus wakeword bridge docs.
- docs(frontend-wakeword-bridge-runtime-helper-contracts): refresh wakeword bridge/protocol docs for the new `wakeword_bridge_runtime.cjs` split, including helper ownership for stderr status parsing/noisy-log suppression, startup/process error mapping, and audio-chunk normalization across Electron-main wakeword lifecycle references.
- refactor(frontend-main-wakeword-bridge-runtime-extraction): extract wakeword status emission, stderr-line handling, startup/process error mapping, and audio-chunk normalization from `frontend/src/main/wakeword_bridge.cjs` into `wakeword_bridge_runtime.cjs`, add direct runtime regression coverage, and keep `knip`/`jscpd` audit gates clean with frontend duplication still at `0`.
- docs(fullstack-execution-policy-and-system-wrapper-boundary-contract-refresh): add a dedicated backend agent reference for `execution/policies.py` (iteration extra-turn, parser-recovery corrective message, bundle gate semantics), refresh native bridge/parser docs with strict computer metadata allowlist + direct-subtool metadata gate details, and update backend/sidecar `system_use` docs to explicitly scope wrapper actions and keep `open_app`/`process` direct-only.
- docs(frontend-main-window-runtime-helper-crosslink-refresh): expand main-process docs with explicit icon/overlay helper module ownership and blur-only query-capture focus-prep output contract after the `main_window_runtime` split, and add hub/lifecycle cross-links to the new helper reference page.
- docs(frontend-main-window-runtime-helper-contract-coverage): add a dedicated reference for `main_window_icon_runtime.cjs` + `main_window_overlay_runtime.cjs`, wire main/frontend hubs to the new page, and refresh electron-main/window-lifecycle runtime docs with explicit helper split ownership plus blur-only query-capture focus-prep behavior.
- refactor(frontend-main-index-bootstrap-runtime-extraction): move main/chat/response/tray creation and VM-worker bootstrap wiring out of `index.cjs` into `main_process_bootstrap_runtime.cjs`, add direct bootstrap runtime coverage, and keep `knip`/`react-compiler`/`deprecation`/`jscpd` audits green with frontend duplication still at `0` and backend route clones still at `0`.
- refactor(frontend-main-window-runtime-helper-extraction): split app/tray icon resolution into `main_window_icon_runtime.cjs` and lazy overlay renderer/window helpers into `main_window_overlay_runtime.cjs`, reducing `main_window_runtime.cjs` to focused window wiring while adding direct helper regressions and revalidating `react-compiler`/`deprecation`, `knip`, and `jscpd` audit gates (`0` frontend clones, backend route clones still `0`).
- refactor(frontend-main-ipc-query-and-session-runtime-extraction): split renderer-query preparation/content-building and transcript-session-sync normalization out of `frontend/src/main/ipc.cjs` into `ipc/ipc_query_runtime.cjs` and `ipc/ipc_transcript_session_sync.cjs`, add direct node-level regression coverage for both helpers, and revalidate bridge/vm-worker/lint-audit/knip/jscpd gates while keeping frontend duplication at `0` and backend API routes at `0` clones.
- refactor(frontend-main-screenshot-bridge-helper-extraction-and-chat-pill-runtime-dedupe): extracted screenshot display-bound resolution into `local_backend_bridge_display_bounds.cjs` and screenshot-path materialization into `local_backend_bridge_screenshot_attachment.cjs` so `local_backend_bridge.cjs` owns only RPC flow/orchestration, deduplicated the identical macOS/Windows chat-pill no-op runtimes behind a shared `chatPillVisibility/noop.ts` helper, trimmed several frontend test-only/internal exports flagged by `knip`, and revalidated targeted frontend lint/tests plus `knip`/`jscpd` audit gates (`0` TS/JS clones, remaining clones only in unrelated dirty backend Python files).
- docs(frontend-display-affinity-and-screenshot-materialization-contracts): add a dedicated display-affinity runtime reference covering query-origin affinity storage, screenshot display-bounds fallback precedence, and display-targeted main-window placement; refresh main/IPC/local-backend/sidecar docs with `prepare-chatbox-for-screenshot` timing contract details and screenshot temp-path artifact materialization behavior (artifact ref success + inline fallback + temp-file cleanup).
- docs(fullstack-system-use-and-local-backend-screenshot-contract-pages): add a backend contract deep reference for unified `system_use` schema/explanation normalization across parser/native bridge/remote dispatch layers, add a frontend local-backend deep reference for screenshot display-bounds fallback and screenshot-path materialization, and refresh local-backend lifecycle/rpc/hub docs with worker-thread stdout parse offload and stderr forwarding semantics.
- docs(backend-browser-schema-projection-and-system-use-sidecar-alignment): refresh backend browser schema docs to distinguish broad `BrowserControlArgs` parse acceptance from the narrower `RemoteBrowserTool.get_json_schema(...)` model-facing projection (canonical action enum + property pruning), and extend `system_use` wrapper contracts with sidecar compatibility-router explanation fallback/mutation-guard details.
- docs(frontend-ipc-query-runtime-helper-split): add a dedicated reference for `ipc_query_runtime.cjs` and `ipc_transcript_session_sync.cjs`, and refresh query relay/replay/websocket/helper-split docs to document helper-owned payload normalization, automated-query preparation, transcript-session alias handling, and main-process state-advance boundaries after `ipc.cjs` extraction.
- fix(frontend-display-affinity-runtime-regressions): preserve target display affinity through main-process dashboard-open composition, open cross-monitor dashboard requests by fitting the target work area directly, keep manual chat-pill drag positions authoritative in main overlay helpers, and pass virtual desktop bounds into sidecar screenshot capture so one-monitor screenshots crop correctly instead of returning all displays; added frontend and sidecar regressions for display affinity propagation, manual pill positioning, and single-monitor screenshot cropping.
- docs(frontend-sidecar-unified-wrapper-routing): document sidecar `system_use` router behavior (tool validation, explanation fallback precedence, deep-copy mutation guard), refresh exposed-tool family mapping, and clarify unified-wrapper validation boundaries in the sidecar execution model.
- docs(fullstack-unified-system-tooling-contracts): update architecture/backend docs for canonical `system_use` wrapper behavior (top-level explanation + nested fallback), declaration-collapse semantics, parser/bridge normalization differences, and sidecar compatibility routing details across tool registry and remote stub references.
- debug(frontend-tool-capture-substep-timing-breakdown): add non-test timing logs for screenshot capture and system-state capture substeps so computer-use runs now show wait, surface hide/show, focus prep, screenshot IPC, and state IPC timing separately when diagnosing slow post-tool capture paths.
- refactor(frontend-unified-screenshot-attachment-and-system-state-pipelines): replace mixed `extractOSstate` capture with explicit `ScreenshotAttachmentPipeline` and `SystemStateCapture` services, route query send/tool-output/main-bridge screenshot handling through one canonical attachment contract (`screenshot` / `screenshot_ref` / `screenshot_url` with inline fallback), delete obsolete screenshot-selection/image-payload helpers, and add frontend/local-backend regressions for attachment materialization plus screenshot-path upload fallback.
- refactor(fullstack-unified-tool-schema-surface): streamline model-facing tool schemas by keeping `computer_use` rationale canonical in top-level metadata, moving `system_use` rationale to top-level `explanation` with backward-compatible fallback for legacy nested `arguments.explanation`, and trimming exposed browser schema to canonical snake_case actions/fields while preserving runtime legacy handling paths.
- fix(frontend-tool-screenshot-debug-flag-propagation): route `WINDIE_DEBUG_TOOL_SCREENSHOT=1` from Electron main into renderer window query params (`debug_tool_screenshot=1`) and gate renderer tool/artifact screenshot tracing off that URL flag, matching the existing stream-trace transport so screenshot-ref debug logs appear reliably in dev sessions; added `MainWindowRuntime` coverage for dashboard/chat/response query propagation.
- debug(frontend-tool-screenshot-ref-trace): add env-gated `WINDIE_DEBUG_TOOL_SCREENSHOT=1` tracing across renderer single-tool execution, renderer artifact upload IPC, and Electron-main artifact HTTP upload so missing `screenshot_ref` runs can be diagnosed from capture selection through `/api/artifacts/` response without changing normal runtime behavior.
- fix(fullstack-tool-output-screenshot-fallback-and-ref-propagation): keep inline screenshots on renderer `tool-runner-result` rows when artifact upload is unavailable, include inline screenshot fallback in single/bundle backend tool-result payloads when no `screenshot_ref` exists, and propagate backend `tool-output.screenshot_ref` through formatter/schema so computer-use tool outputs consistently retain screenshot attachments across UI, backend, and history flows; added frontend regressions for tool-runner/chat-stream attachment fallback plus backend formatter coverage.
- feat(fullstack-system-use-unified-tool-wrapper): add unified `system_use` tool envelope across backend schema/registry/parser and sidecar routing for `run_shell_command`, `replace`, `read_file`, `get_system_stats`, and `get_open_windows`; update chat allowlist to unified names, refresh tool-system/native-bridge docs, and add backend/sidecar regression suites for schema parity and wrapper routing behavior.
- refactor(frontend-session-snapshot-projection-runtime-sharing): move main-session snapshot projection into shared `conversationSessionRuntime.ts` so `useChatMessageSender` and `useChatSessionBootstrap` apply the same transcript/chat conversation update contract; added direct runtime tests and updated send-path docs.
- refactor(frontend-system-capture-runtime-extraction): extract `SystemCapture` screenshot-argument building, screenshot payload normalization, and empty-result composition into `systemCaptureRuntime.ts`, leaving `extractOSstate` focused on IPC/capture lifecycle orchestration; added direct helper regressions and refreshed send/capture docs.
- refactor(frontend-query-screenshot-pipeline-extraction): move query screenshot capture/upload/ref-resolution out of `useChatMessageSender` into `queryScreenshotPipeline.ts`, keeping the hook focused on conversation/session orchestration while preserving clipboard-first, auto-capture fallback, and artifact-ref normalization behavior; updated send-path docs and added direct helper regression coverage.
- fix(frontend-linux-chat-pill-screenshot-hide-settlement): add a bounded `120ms` Linux compositor-settle wait after renderer-owned `hide-chatbox` capture collapse so minimal chat pill screenshots no longer capture the disappearing overlay frame; added chat-pill visibility and `SystemCapture` ordering regressions to lock `hide -> settle -> screenshot -> restore`.
- refactor(fullstack-stream-trace-gating-and-query-completion-helper): moved renderer stream trace logging behind a dedicated `debug_stream` flag propagated from Electron `WINDIE_DEBUG_STREAM_EVENTS=1` (instead of always-on `dev_ui=1`), extracted reusable renderer trace helpers, and unified backend query completion/fallback handling through `query_execution_completion.py` so missing-terminal fallback uses the same completion resolution/backfill path as normal `streaming-complete`; added main-window runtime regressions plus backend helper/execute fallback coverage.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-idle-sending-same-turn-guard): stop treating same-turn backend packets as stale while a renderer is `isSending=true` in `phase='idle'`, which occurs when the sending window misses the replayed `local-user-message`; this allows re-anchored `streaming-response` and `streaming-complete` events to update the store instead of being dropped after `system-prompt` seeds the current turn ref.
- refactor(frontend-chat-stream-terminal-handoff-guard): extract terminal-handoff stale-turn rules in `chatStreamEventRuntime` into named helper predicates (`normalizeTurnRef`, awaiting-first-chunk mismatch, terminal pending handoff, optimistic user-tail detection) so second-turn re-anchor behavior is explicit and future dashboard/pill stream fixes do not depend on one dense guard branch.
- fix(frontend-chat-loop-ui): keep dashboard and pill in `awaiting-reply` while a new send latch is active over terminal `complete|error` stream phases and the current turn still has no visible assistant reply, so later turns keep their typing indicator instead of inheriting the previous turn's terminal phase.
- refactor(frontend-chat-presentation): collapse current-turn UI derivation into one pure `resolveCurrentTurnPresentationState(...)` contract, shrink `useChatLoopUiState` into a transport/watchdog hook, and move awaiting-dot target selection out of `MessageList` so dashboard/pill renderers consume one presentation pipeline.
- fix(frontend-tool-runner-terminal-handoff): align tool-runner stale-turn cancellation and local execution-result persistence with `chatStreamTerminalHandoffGuard` so same-turn tool calls/results survive terminal pending-handoff windows (for example later-turn empty assistant placeholders during tool execution) instead of disappearing from the dashboard while final assistant text still streams.
- debug(frontend-renderer-stream-and-surface-trace): add dev-ui renderer tracing for `useChatStream` and `ChatBoxResponse` so each backend event logs per-window conversation/workspace state before and after dispatch plus response-surface visibility/phase decisions, isolating whether live reply failures come from store mutation or overlay rendering state.
- fix(frontend-renderer-conversation-projection-reanchor): treat conversation-scoped backend events as authoritative active-chat projection in each renderer window so late-mounted overlay surfaces re-anchor to the live conversation even if they missed the initial `local-user-message`; updated chat-stream runtime regression coverage for non-local stream-event promotion.
- debug(frontend-main-stream-trace): add gated Electron-main stream tracing under `WINDIE_DEBUG_STREAM_EVENTS=1` so websocket backend events log on receipt and on `from-backend` renderer broadcast with type/turn/conversation/text-length summaries, narrowing live chat-stream failures without involving the local sidecar runtime.
- fix(fullstack-streaming-complete-final-response-fallback): preserve `payload.final_response` on backend `streaming-complete` envelopes and let renderer completion handling materialize/update the assistant `llm-text` row from terminal payload when no visible chunk arrived, preventing minimal chat pill/dashboard sessions from getting stuck on the typing indicator after backend completion; added backend formatter and frontend transcript regression coverage and refreshed API/formatter docs.
- fix(frontend-overlay-terminal-fallback-and-token-memory-completion-guards): add overlay-phase terminal fallback transitions in Electron main for `token-count`/`memory-store`/`assistant-message-full` while stream is active, and finalize renderer sending/thinking state on `token-count` (plus awaiting-first-chunk `memory-store`) when terminal stream packets are missing; updated overlay-phase and transcript stream regression expectations.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-awaiting-first-chunk-turn-reanchor): allow turn-ref reanchor during `awaiting-first-chunk` when a renderer workspace is still sending but holds an older active turn ref, preventing stuck typing indicators when first backend packets arrive under a new turn id; added stale-turn guard regression coverage.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-transcript-session-conversation-precedence): make chat stream ingress sync transcript session with the resolved event conversation ref first (fallback to active ref only when event conversation is absent), so dashboard and minimal chat pill stay on the same active chat stream; updated `ChatStreamBackendIngress` regression coverage for precedence behavior.
- docs(backend-protocol-surface-validation-state-runtime-parser-alignment): refresh backend protocol surface/validation/state references to current websocket parse-runtime split (`message_parse_runtime`, `json_parse`, `loop_runtime`), fix handshake control-path naming (`perform_handshake`), and update state coverage snapshot counts.
- docs(backend-protocol-lifecycle-testing-helper-split-coverage): refresh backend protocol testing/lifecycle references with current websocket helper-module ownership (`connection`, `json_parse`, `message_parse_runtime`, `loop_runtime`, `task_manager`), add missing handshake/parse/task-runtime contract details, and update coverage snapshots/test index lists.
- docs(frontend-protocol-lifecycle-testing-split-registrar-coverage): refresh frontend protocol lifecycle/testing references with current split IPC registrar ownership (`overlay_phase_ipc_runtime`, `window_controls_ipc_runtime`, `permission_ipc_runtime`), add display-query and permission-runtime lifecycle/test contract details, and update coverage snapshots/test index lists to current test-surface counts.
- docs(frontend-inventory-ipc-surface-owner-split-alignment): refresh frontend inventory protocol surface matrix to current split registrar ownership (`overlay_phase_ipc_runtime`, `window_controls_ipc_runtime`, `permission_ipc_runtime`) for invoke/send channels, and add direct deep-reference links for `get-displays` and Linux sudo-toggle runtime contracts.
- docs(frontend-backend-endpoint-resolution-packaged-fallback-and-origin-contract): extend websocket/query/compatibility docs with explicit packaged endpoint fallback env behavior (`WINDIE_DEFAULT_PACKAGED_BACKEND_*`), IPC initialization refresh semantics (`isPackaged`), and `wsOrigin` relay diagnostics contract.
- docs(frontend-main-lifecycle-registrar-channel-detail-links): extend main-process lifecycle registrar docs with explicit `get-displays` mapped payload shape and Linux sudo-toggle runtime-link details for `set-agent-sudo-access`.
- docs(fullstack-ipc-display-sudo-contract-details-and-remote-tool-serialization-notes): enrich frontend IPC contract docs with concrete `get-displays` payload and Linux sudo-toggle runtime behavior (with direct deep-reference links), and expand backend remote tool domain docs with explicit default-arg serialization and unified `computer_use` envelope-to-concrete-tool output shaping details.
- docs(backend-compaction-crosslink-in-config-and-session-runtime): extend backend config/session runtime docs with direct compaction-engine execution links and runtime-attachment notes for manual/auto compaction paths.
- docs(frontend-display-query-handler-payload-contract): add a dedicated Electron-main deep reference for `get-displays` payload shaping (`id`, positional label format, `isPrimary`, bounds, scale factor), plus cross-links from main/frontend lifecycle and IPC docs.
- docs(backend-compaction-engine-decision-strategy-and-events): add a dedicated backend agent deep reference for `agent/compaction/*` internals, including decision gating (`disabled`/`below-threshold`/`cooldown`), trigger fallback resolution, inline summary strategy/fallback behavior, and auto-pre/auto-mid/manual lifecycle event integration points.
- docs(frontend-agent-sudo-toggle-runtime-contract): add a dedicated Electron-main reference for Linux `set-agent-sudo-access` behavior (username sanitization, sudoers rule scripts, `pkexec` enable flow, `sudo -n` disable flow, cancel/error normalization), and wire cross-links from main/frontend permission docs.
- docs(frontend-screenshot-visibility-reference-label-and-frontmatter-sync): fix malformed front-matter opening delimiter in the Linux screenshot visibility runtime reference and align frontend hub/main hub link labels with the canonical page title.
