- docs(frontend-local-backend-window-visibility-module-canonical-path-sync): update main/inventory docs to use `local_backend_bridge_window_visibility.cjs` as the canonical module path (instead of compatibility alias `local_backend_bridge_windows.cjs`) and align capability matrix wording with screenshot visibility runtime wrapper ownership.
- docs(frontend-screenshot-runtime-inventory-and-jsonrpc-contract-sync): align inventory, JSON-RPC, and local-backend RPC/lifecycle docs with current screenshot visibility runtime ownership (main-process wrapper pass-through, renderer-owned Linux hide/show orchestration) and remove stale Linux hide/restore claims.
- test(frontend-electron-launcher-headless-no-xvfb-direct-launch): add Linux launcher regression ensuring headless sessions without `xvfb-run` availability fall back to direct Electron execution instead of attempting wrapper-only launch behavior.
- test(frontend-tool-result-envelope-structured-clone-fallback-contract): add frontend regression that forces `structuredClone` absence and verifies `ToolResultEnvelope` builders still deep-clone payloads through fallback logic, preventing mutation leaks on runtimes without native `structuredClone`.
- docs(frontend-screenshot-visibility-runtime-ownership-contract-refresh): update local-backend screenshot/window-guard docs to current behavior where platform `screenshot_window_visibility/*` runtimes are pass-through wrappers and Linux hide/show ownership lives in renderer `SurfaceOrchestrator`; refresh linked local-backend windows/overlay hub pages and sidecar lifecycle reference wording accordingly.
- test(backend-incoming-tool-result-schema-contracts): add direct schema-level regressions for incoming `ToolResultPayload`/`ToolBundleResultPayload` contracts covering correlation-id trim/reject behavior, bundle required fields/status validation, strict `capture_meta` extra-field rejection, and allowed tool-specific extra keys in `ToolResultData`.
- test(frontend-electron-launcher-display-present-no-xvfb-wrap): add Linux launcher regression ensuring `buildLaunchCommand` executes Electron directly when `DISPLAY` is present, preventing unnecessary `xvfb-run` wrapping on already-graphical sessions.
- test(frontend-electron-launcher-binary-path-trim-and-empty-validation): extend launcher binary-resolution regressions to lock whitespace-trim normalization for valid paths and fail-close rejection for blank/empty electron binary inputs with deterministic startup error messaging.
- test(backend-websocket-tool-result-correlation-type-and-bundle-step-contracts): expand websocket parser regressions to fail-close non-string `tool-result.request_id`/`tool-bundle-result.bundle_id` payloads and bundle-result payloads missing required `step_results`, locking strict inbound schema boundary behavior.
- docs(frontend-runtime-paths-and-local-backend-launch-contract-refresh): align Electron main runtime path docs with current bundled-runtime behavior (`resolveSidecarLaunchTarget` binary-first fallback, packaged `.pyc` script path resolution, bundled Playwright browser path export, and packaged Python fail-close policy), and refresh local-backend lifecycle docs to match the same spawn/env contracts.
- test(sidecar-tool-registry-computer-use-unexpected-metadata-ordering): add sidecar regression ensuring `computer_use.metadata` unexpected-field error output is deterministically sorted when multiple extra keys are present, while preserving fail-close no-subtool-execution behavior.
- test(frontend-tool-runner-result-contract-payload-clone-boundary): extend wrapper-level result-envelope regressions so `buildToolRunnerResultEnvelope`/`buildToolRunnerBundleResultEnvelope` preserve cloned payload snapshots and do not inherit caller mutations after envelope construction.
- docs(frontend-window-lifecycle-vm-mode-consistency-and-backend-services-crosslink): align window/overlay lifecycle startup and shutdown docs with VM-mode conditional behavior (`createChatWindow`/tray/hotkey gating and `before-quit` VM worker stop), and link backend services storage map to the new VM run-control support-helper deep reference.
- fix(frontend-tool-result-envelope-payload-clone-boundary): deep-clone tool-result/tool-bundle-result envelope payloads at construction time to prevent caller-side mutation leaks from rewriting queued correlation/result data; add frontend regression coverage for both top-level and nested payload aliasing.
- docs(frontend-main-vm-mode-lifecycle-and-overlay-bootstrap-corrections): align main-process docs with current runtime contracts (single-instance throttle flow, VM-mode overlay/tray/hotkey guards, before-quit VM worker shutdown, chat overlay `520x116` size, lazy renderer loading, and overlay-only content-protection ownership).
- docs(backend-vm-run-control-support-helper-contracts): add a dedicated backend services deep reference for `vm_run_control_support/*` helper boundaries (assignment, transitions, pending-control draining, event log sequencing, payload shaping, worker-state normalization), and wire it into services hub plus VM run-control runtime references.
- test(backend-response-parser-legacy-mouse-unexpected-metadata-rejection): add parser-boundary regression that direct legacy `mouse_control` payloads carrying extra metadata keys (for example `trace_id`) fail with the same strict `unexpected metadata fields` contract enforced for unified `computer_use`.
- test(sidecar-tool-registry-computer-use-required-metadata-matrices): expand `tools.registry` runtime regressions with full required-field matrices for `computer_use.metadata` (missing and non-string `description`/`explanation`/`expectation`) while asserting fail-close no-subtool-execution behavior for each invalid case.
- refactor(fullstack-chat-state-subfoldering-wakeword-retry-and-semantic-service-factory): moved chat state helpers into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/utils/state/` (components/hooks/tool-runner/tests/docs rewired), increased missing-device wakeword retry delay to `60s` with devicechange-based unlock in `useWakewordDetection`, and consolidated `/api/semantic` route dependency wiring through `_build_semantic_service()`.
- test(backend-parser-validation-computer-use-missing-field-matrix): add validator-level metadata matrix coverage for both legacy (`mouse_control`) and unified (`computer_use`) tool names when each required metadata field is omitted, enforcing deterministic `ParseValidationError` fail-close behavior by missing key.
- docs(backend-runs-doc-crosslink-discoverability): add `/api/runs` helper-contract cross-links from model and response-builder deep references so validation/projection ownership is discoverable from all runs route contract pages.
- refactor(fullstack-chat-state-subfoldering-and-wakeword-missing-device-retry-hardening): moved chat loop/surface state helpers into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/utils/state/` and rewired hook/component/tool-runner/test imports/docs; hardened `useWakewordDetection` missing-device retry behavior with a longer lockout retry window (`60s`) while preserving devicechange-based recovery; consolidated semantic route service construction via `_build_semantic_service()` in `backend/src/api/routes/memory/semantic/router.py` and updated backend/frontend references.
- test(backend-response-parser-computer-use-missing-metadata-field-matrix): add parser-boundary regression matrices for both unified `computer_use` and direct legacy `mouse_control` payloads that omit each required metadata key (`description`, `explanation`, `expectation`), asserting deterministic `ParseValidationError` fail-close behavior per missing field.
- docs(frontend-vm-worker-and-codex-oauth-runtime-contracts): expand Electron main VM worker docs with heartbeat/session fallback and mapping-lifecycle guarantees, control-command no-op gates, stream relay payload shape, and OpenAI Codex OAuth callback/token-completeness normalization details plus direct test references.
- test(sidecar-computer-use-required-metadata-missing-field-matrix): add parameterized sidecar local-backend regressions for missing `description`/`explanation`/`expectation` fields in `computer_use.metadata`, asserting fail-closed error payloads and no downstream subtool execution for each missing field.
- docs(backend-runs-route-helper-contracts-and-service-support-split): expand `/api/runs` route/service reference with current `vm_run_control_support/*` helper ownership, queue/transition/event cursor guarantees, and add a dedicated `route_helpers.py` contract page for control validation plus incremental event projection; wire the new page into backend API hub cross-links.
- test(frontend-main-second-instance-throttle-zero-cooldown-override): add lifecycle regression that verifies `secondInstanceFocusCooldownMs=0` disables focus throttling and preserves one-focus-per-event behavior without throttled-log emission.
- test(backend-computer-use-catalog-parity-contract): add backend cross-module parity regressions asserting unified `computer_use` tool enum stays aligned with remote execution mapping keys and registry legacy-name collapse set, preventing schema/registry/executor drift on supported computer subtools.
- fix(frontend-electron-launcher-platform-binary-guard): add platform-aware electron binary resolution in launcher runtime so Linux/WSL rejects Windows-only `electron.exe` paths with a clear reinstall hint (and uses non-`.exe` sibling when present); add frontend launcher regressions for Windows pass-through, Linux sibling fallback, and mismatch error contract.
- test(sidecar-computer-use-required-metadata-string-validation): add sidecar local-backend regression that rejects non-string required metadata values inside `computer_use.metadata` (for example object-valued `explanation`) and asserts fail-closed no-subtool-execution behavior.
- test(backend-computer-use-schema-guidance-and-required-order-contract): strengthen canonical `computer_use` declaration regressions to lock grounding guidance phrases (OCR ambiguity retry, latest-screenshot/manual cursor reference, post-action screenshot verification) and exact required-field ordering for top-level (`tool`, `metadata`) plus metadata (`description`, `explanation`, `expectation`) contracts.
- test(sidecar-computer-use-schema-contract-parity): add a sidecar/backend boundary regression that asserts sidecar `computer_use` required metadata fields and subtool allowlist remain in lockstep with backend canonical unified schema (`tool`/`metadata` required envelope plus metadata field ordering), preventing silent schema-vs-runtime drift.
- fix(frontend-main-second-instance-focus-throttle): throttle rapid Electron `second-instance` focus requests in main-process lifecycle runtime to prevent repeated focus-stealing loops while preserving normal single-instance relaunch behavior; add deterministic lifecycle regression coverage with injected clock values.
- fix(backend-tool-result-router-route-mode-validation-guard): make shared tool-result router fail closed on unexpected `route_mode` values instead of silently defaulting to individual semantics; add regression coverage asserting `ValueError` and no storage/screenshot side effects for invalid modes.
- fix(backend-tool-result-router-correlation-id-trim-and-fail-close): normalize correlation ids inside shared `ToolResultRouter.route_result` (trim padded ids before screenshot/storage routing) and fail closed for whitespace-only ids to prevent state/storage mutation when correlation identity is invalid; add router regressions for trimmed single/bundle paths and whitespace-drop behavior.
- test(frontend-tool-runner-correlated-payload-whitespace-id-drop): extend callback send-gate regressions so correlated `tool-result`/`tool-bundle-result` payloads with whitespace-only ids are dropped (same fail-close path as missing ids), preventing malformed id formatting from leaking to backend routing.
- test(backend-websocket-message-parse-runtime-error-mapping-and-dependency-forwarding): expand parse-runtime coverage for parser dependency forwarding (`offload_threshold_bytes` + injected loop getter), malformed JSON mapping, non-object root mapping, and unexpected-error fallback logging/response (`An internal error occurred`).
- test(frontend-tool-runner-bundle-correlation-trim-tracking): extend callback send-gate regressions so tracked bundle payloads with whitespace-padded `bundle_id` are accepted via normalized correlation resolution, then dropped after untracking to preserve late-result suppression symmetry with single-tool paths.
- test(backend-api-tool-result-handler-correlation-trim-routing): extend API handler regressions so `ToolResultMessage` and `ToolBundleResultMessage` payload ids with surrounding whitespace are normalized by schema validation before session routing (`request_id`/`bundle_id` trimmed at boundary).
- test(backend-websocket-message-handler-runtime-delegation-contract): refresh websocket message-handler parse tests to assert delegation into `message_parse_runtime` with forwarded offload/runtime dependencies, replacing stale monkeypatch assumptions on removed module-local parser internals.
- refactor(fullstack-chat-session-utils-subfolder-and-websocket-message-parse-runtime): moved chat session helpers into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/utils/session/` (`conversationRef`, `newChatSession`, `transcriptMessagePayload`), extracted websocket parse/validation runtime into `backend/src/api/routes/websocket/message_parse_runtime.py` while preserving `message_handler.py` monkeypatch compatibility seams, added focused backend parse-runtime tests, and updated chat/websocket docs plus renderer folder structure references.
- fix(backend-websocket-tool-result-correlation-id-trim-validation): add schema-level trim/reject validators for inbound `tool-result.request_id` and `tool-bundle-result.bundle_id` so whitespace-only ids fail closed and padded ids normalize before routing; add websocket parser regressions for trim-success and whitespace rejection on both payload types.
- fix(frontend-tool-runner-send-gate-correlated-payload-id-required): fail closed in `useToolRunner` backend-send callback when `tool-result`/`tool-bundle-result` payloads omit correlation ids, while preserving tracked-send behavior for valid ids; add helper coverage for required-id detection and callback regressions for malformed-envelope drop + trim-normalized tracking acceptance.
- test(frontend-tool-runner-callback-correlation-trim-tracking): extend `useToolRunner` callback wiring coverage so backend payload send gating accepts tracked envelopes whose `request_id` is whitespace-padded (trim normalization), then drops later sends after untracking to preserve stale-result suppression under id-format drift.
- refactor(fullstack-chat-message-sender-subfoldering-and-websocket-loop-runtime-helpers): moved chat sender helper modules into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/utils/messageSender/`, extracted readable-file attachment context assembly into `readableFileAttachmentContext.ts`, memoized sender-surface policy resolution in `useChatMessageSender` (modern React memoization pattern), extracted websocket receive-loop timeout and task-limit helper logic into `backend/src/api/routes/websocket/loop_runtime.py`, added focused backend/frontend regression tests, and updated chat/websocket docs plus renderer folder structure references.
- fix(fullstack-tool-correlation-id-whitespace-normalization): normalize/trim execution correlation ids at backend `ExecutionRef.from_metadata` and frontend tool-result envelope resolvers so whitespace-only ids are rejected and padded ids resolve consistently; add backend and frontend regressions (including runner/backend parity) for trim-and-empty-id semantics.
- test(backend-tool-sender-preparation-failure-model-facing-metadata): extend tool-sender preparation-failure regressions so both coordinate-resolution failures and `invalid_computer_use_tool` validation failures still emit `model_facing_tool_call` metadata on `ToolCallEvent`, preserving frontend transparency payload shape when execution is skipped.
- test(frontend-tool-runner-stale-turn-skip-precedence): extend stale-turn guard coverage so `tool-call` events tagged with `computer_use_validation_failed + skip_frontend_execution` still produce deterministic `frontend_stale_turn_cancelled` result envelopes when the turn is stale, preventing metadata-based bypass of turn identity gating.
- fix(frontend-tool-runner-event-guard-import-path): update `toolRunnerEventGuards` to import `chatStreamConversationGate` from the post-reorg `utils/chatStream/` module path so tool-runner hook suites resolve deterministically; add hook-level regression coverage that `computer_use_validation_failed + skip_frontend_execution` tool calls are skipped without sidecar execution.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-skip-metadata-transparency): include `frontend_execution_skipped` in formatted tool-call transparency output whenever backend metadata sets `skip_frontend_execution`, including non-parser skip paths like `computer_use_validation_failed`; add frontend regressions for formatting output, stream-ingestion metadata projection, and skip-flag helper behavior to prevent reason-specific coupling drift.
- refactor(fullstack-tool-execution-folder-reorg-and-runs-route-helper-consolidation): moved renderer tool-execution modules under `frontend/src/renderer/infrastructure/services/toolExecution/`, split single-tool and bundle flows into `singleToolExecution.ts` and `bundleExecution.ts` with a slimmer `ToolExecutionService` wrapper, extracted `/api/runs` route validation/event-response helpers into `backend/src/api/routes/runs/route_helpers.py`, added backend route-helper tests and frontend service-split delegation tests, and refreshed docs for the new module ownership/paths.
- fix(backend-tool-sender-preparation-failure-metadata-classification): classify preparation-failure frontend events by failure type so invalid bridge-normalized `computer_use` calls emit `computer_use_validation_failed` metadata (not `coordinate_resolution_failed`) while keeping coordinate-resolution failures unchanged; add sender regression coverage for the new fail-close metadata contract.
- fix(backend-tool-preparer-invalid-computer-use-short-circuit): fail closed in tool preparation when bridge-normalized tool name is `invalid_computer_use_tool`, returning deterministic synthetic preparation errors (with request/bundle execution identity already attached) so frontend dispatch is skipped for already-invalid computer-use calls; add single and bundle regression coverage.
- test(backend-tool-registry-computer-use-additional-properties-contract): extend tool-registry declaration regressions to assert canonical `computer_use` function parameters and metadata objects emit `additionalProperties: false`, locking strict schema allowlist guarantees at provider-facing declaration boundaries.
- test(backend-interaction-loop-native-computer-use-metadata-allowlist-fail-close): extend interaction-loop native tool-call regressions to assert `computer_use` calls with unexpected metadata fields are normalized to `invalid_computer_use_tool` before execution/history staging, preserving deterministic staged-id and terminal-completion behavior.
- test(backend-response-parser-computer-use-metadata-allowlist-rejection): extend parser trust-boundary coverage to assert direct unified `computer_use` calls fail with `ParseValidationError` when metadata includes unexpected fields, pairing strict metadata allowlist enforcement with end-to-end JSON response parsing tests.
- fix(backend-unified-computer-use-schema-additional-properties-guard): lock strict JSON-schema allowlists in canonical unified `computer_use` declaration by adding `additionalProperties: false` on the top-level envelope and required metadata object; extend schema contract tests to prevent permissive drift.
- test(frontend-local-backend-rpc-computer-use-metadata-allowlist-rejection): extend `LocalBackendBridge.rpc` coverage with a paired boundary assertion that extra `computer_use.metadata` fields are forwarded unchanged to sidecar and return deterministic allowlist-rejection errors.
- fix(fullstack-computer-use-metadata-allowlist-enforcement): enforce strict `computer_use` metadata allowlist (`description`, `explanation`, `expectation`) across backend parser validation, backend native tool-call bridge normalization, and sidecar registry dispatch so unexpected metadata keys fail closed instead of being preserved/dropped silently; add regression updates for backend bridge/validator and sidecar local-backend/registry boundaries.
- fix(backend-native-tool-call-id-whitespace-normalization): trim and reject whitespace-only native tool-call ids in bridge parsing/history mapping (`to_parsed_tool_call`, `to_history_tool_calls`, `extract_tool_call_ids`) so correlation falls back deterministically instead of emitting blank ids; add bridge regressions for whitespace-id rejection and fallback behavior.
- test(frontend-local-backend-rpc-run-shell-args-immutability): extend `LocalBackendBridge.rpc` coverage to lock that `execute-tool` sudo-mode injection for `run_shell_command` does not mutate caller payload objects while preserving expected JSON-RPC argument shape.
- test(sidecar-local-backend-computer-use-mutation-boundary): add `_handle_execute_tool` regression ensuring mutating subtools cannot leak `computer_use.arguments` mutations back into caller envelopes, pairing sidecar registry immutability assertions at the local-backend execution boundary.
- test(backend-interaction-loop-native-computer-use-fail-close): add interaction-loop regression covering native `computer_use` calls missing required metadata, asserting bridge normalization to `invalid_computer_use_tool`, staged tool-call id continuity, and final-turn completion behavior after failed tool execution path.
- fix(sidecar-computer-use-arguments-deep-copy-boundary): deep-copy unified `computer_use.arguments` before subtool dispatch in the sidecar registry so subtool-local argument mutations cannot leak back into the original envelope; add sidecar regression coverage that reproduces and blocks mutation leakage.
- fix(frontend-local-backend-tool-args-deep-copy): deep-copy nested tool argument payloads in `local_backend_bridge_tool_args` (including unified `computer_use` envelopes and non-shell tool args) before JSON-RPC handoff so bridge-side mutations cannot alias caller state; add frontend regressions that reproduce nested aliasing and lock immutability.
- test(backend-computer-use-schema-grounding-and-metadata-contract): extend unified `computer_use` schema contract coverage to lock required metadata fields (`description`, `explanation`, `expectation`), description-level OCR/prediction guidance, and mouse argument conditional requirements for manual coordinates, OCR (`ocr_text` or `candidate_id`), and prediction description.
- fix(backend-native-tool-call-bridge-deep-copy-boundaries): deep-copy native tool-call arguments and promoted metadata during bridge conversion, and deep-copy history `tool_calls[].arguments` payloads to prevent nested mutation aliasing between provider payloads, parsed calls, and history rows; add regression tests that reproduce both aliasing paths.
- fix(backend-native-tool-call-bridge-computer-metadata-gate): enforce required `computer_use` metadata (`description`, `explanation`, `expectation`) at native tool-call bridge conversion time, trim required metadata values, fail-close missing/blank/non-object metadata as `invalid_computer_use_tool`, and add bridge regressions covering unified/direct computer-tool metadata enforcement.
- refactor(fullstack-wakeword-missing-device-lock-and-artifacts-route-package): extracted wakeword capture lock helpers into `frontend/src/renderer/features/voice/utils/wakewordCaptureGuard.ts`, prevented suppression-only wakeword toggles from clearing missing-device lockout (plus devicechange-driven unlock and moved hook regressions to `tests/frontend/voice/WakewordDetectionHook.test.ts`), and split backend artifacts routes into `backend/src/api/routes/artifacts/{router,models}.py` with compatibility exports and docs path updates.
- refactor(fullstack-transcript-pending-folder-reorg-and-runs-response-projections): moved transcript pending queue modules under `frontend/src/renderer/infrastructure/transcript/pending/`, extracted queue flush/retry orchestration into `pendingTranscriptMessages.ts`, split `/api/runs` response shaping into `backend/src/api/routes/runs/response_builders.py`, and added focused backend/frontend regression tests.
- refactor(fullstack-chat-message-utils-subfolder-and-runs-worker-response-builder-dedupe): moved message-focused chat helpers into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/utils/message/`, rewired chat components/tests/docs to the new paths, reduced `DashboardSidebar` hover-reset coupling by centralizing reset in explicit collapse/expand handlers, and deduplicated `/api/runs` worker response assembly via shared `response_builders.py` helpers with backend builder tests.
- refactor(fullstack-embeddings-service-extraction-and-message-content-subcomponent-split): extracted `/api/embeddings` conversion/response/error/health-probe logic into `backend/src/api/routes/memory/embeddings/service.py` (with focused service tests), split `MessageContent` payload renderers into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/components/message/content/*`, and rewired docs/tests while keeping lint/knip/jscpd + API-routes clone scans green.
- refactor(fullstack-embeddings-route-package-and-message-list-component-split): converted memory embeddings route into `backend/src/api/routes/memory/embeddings/{router,models}.py` with package exports, split `MessageList` row/editor internals into `components/message/{MessageItem,UserMessageEditComposer}.jsx`, rewired docs/runtime logging path references, and revalidated backend memory/frontend message suites plus refactor audit gates.
- refactor(fullstack-memory-semantic-package-and-message-component-folder-reorg): split memory semantic routes into `backend/src/api/routes/memory/semantic/{router,models,service,parser}.py` (removing flat `semantic*.py` files), moved message-focused renderer components into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/components/message/`, rewired backend/frontend tests and docs to new module paths, and revalidated semantic-route tests plus frontend lint/knip/jscpd audit gates.
- refactor(fullstack-websocket-router-extraction-and-overlay-utils-subfoldering): extracted websocket receive-loop route ownership into `backend/src/api/routes/websocket/router.py` with package-level compatibility exports for existing tests/importers, moved renderer overlay utilities into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/utils/overlay/`, rewired chat imports/tests/docs to new paths, and revalidated websocket + overlay/chat-stream suites alongside `lint:audit`, `knip`, and `jscpd` gates.
- refactor(frontend-chatbox-helper-path-cleanup): removed legacy `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/components/{ChatBoxIcons.jsx,ChatBoxImagePreviewRow.jsx,chatBoxResponseUtils.js}` after subfolder migration so imports resolve through `components/chatbox/*` only.
- docs(frontend-chatbox-component-split-and-overlay-pill-runtime): add a dedicated renderer chat presentation reference for `ChatBox`/`ChatBoxResponse` plus extracted `components/chatbox/*` helper boundaries, including drag/focus/preview-lane contracts, response overlay size-report semantics, and test-backed runtime invariants.
- docs(backend-websocket-router-package-split-contract): add a dedicated API websocket reference for `routes/websocket/router.py` ownership and package-level `__init__.py` compatibility rebinding used by monkeypatch tests, including timeout/cleanup and close-path semantics.
- docs(backend-memory-semantic-package-split-contract): add a dedicated API memory reference for `routes/memory/semantic/*` package ownership and `semantic/__init__.py` compatibility exports, and refresh memory hub/validation docs with current canonical module paths and package-split routing details.
- docs(frontend-response-overlay-utility-contracts): add a dedicated renderer overlays deep reference for `utils/overlay/*` contracts (shared JSON phase parity, payload normalization, `useSyncExternalStore` listener integration, layout-mode resolution, and frame-size rounding), and refresh overlay/chatbox docs for fixed `236px` response framing with `awaiting-typing` compact-hover sizing.
- docs(backend-memory-embeddings-package-split-contract): add a dedicated API memory embeddings package reference for `routes/memory/embeddings/*` ownership and `embeddings/__init__.py` compatibility exports, and extend API/memory route docs with router-vs-service boundary details and package-level import guarantees.
- refactor(fullstack-query-helper-direct-imports-and-chatbox-subfoldering): removed `QueryExecutionService` pass-through compatibility wrappers in favor of direct helper-module calls/tests (`query_event_extraction` and `query_execution_runtime`), moved chatbox support files into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/components/chatbox/`, and hardened overlay phase store teardown by resetting to `idle` when the last subscriber unsubscribes.
- docs(backend-query-execution-support-helper-boundaries): add a dedicated backend API services reference for `query_execution_support/*` helper boundaries (runtime/input/pipeline/stream-state/cancellation ownership), and align query execution completion/runtime docs with direct `query_event_extraction` helper usage plus current helper-test coverage.
- refactor(fullstack-query-extraction-wrapper-removal-and-chatbox-component-folder-reorg): removed `QueryExecutionService` compatibility wrapper methods in favor of direct helper-module usage (`query_event_extraction` + `query_execution_runtime`) with updated backend helper tests, moved chatbox helper components into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/components/chatbox/`, and rewired overlay docs/tests/imports while keeping refactor audit gates clean.
- docs(fullstack-tool-registry-and-permission-store-liveness-contracts): expand backend tool-registry docs with explicit legacy computer-name normalization + canonical `computer_use` declaration-collapse semantics, and add renderer permission-store liveness coverage for active vs dormant actions plus current probe/recheck loading/concurrency behavior.
- docs(backend-computer-use-metadata-allowlist-contract): extend computer tool schema docs with explicit `ComputerUseMetadata.extra='forbid'` allowlist behavior and test-backed coverage for whitespace trimming/rejection and unexpected-metadata-key failures.
- refactor(fullstack-vm-bulk-stop-helper-and-overlay-phase-sync-external-store): extracted `VmRunControlService.stop_all_runs` filtering/mutation loop into `vm_run_control_bulk_stop.py` with focused backend helper tests, converted `useResponseOverlayPhase` from `useEffect` subscription wiring to `useSyncExternalStore` backed by overlay-phase snapshot/store helpers, and added frontend hook/listener regressions plus docs updates for the new external-store contract.
- docs(frontend-overlay-phase-listener-sync-store-contract): add a dedicated renderer overlays deep reference for `overlayPhaseListener` and `useResponseOverlayPhase` contracts (parsed payload gating, shared lazy IPC subscription lifecycle, store-subscriber set behavior, and `useSyncExternalStore` snapshot semantics), and link it from the overlays docs hub.
- docs(backend-vm-run-bulk-stop-helper-contract): add a dedicated backend services deep reference for `vm_run_control_bulk_stop.stop_active_runs` (workspace/status filtering, callback invocation order, and `VmRunControlService.stop_all_runs` integration), and link it from VM run-control service docs hub/reference pages.
- docs(frontend-ipc-replay-and-transcript-sync-contracts): add a dedicated Electron-main deep reference for turn-scoped replay buffering and cross-window `transcript-session-sync` normalization, and update IPC split/query relay/websocket handshake/main hub docs with replay lifecycle and session-sync integration details.
- docs(backend-runs-route-model-and-export-contracts): add a dedicated `/api/runs` models/package-export deep reference covering `models.py` request/response literals, endpoint model bindings, and `runs/__init__.py` compatibility exports; update runs route/support docs and backend API hub links to reflect the split package surface (`router.py`, `support.py`, `models.py`).
- refactor(fullstack-routes-runs-package-and-main-ipc-folder-reorg): consolidated hosted VM runs route files into `backend/src/api/routes/runs/` (`router.py`, `models.py`, `support.py`, package exports), moved Electron main-process IPC helper modules into `frontend/src/main/ipc/`, rewired imports/tests/docs to new module paths, and revalidated targeted backend/frontend suites plus refactor audit gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- docs(frontend-chat-stream-ingress-failsafe-contracts): add a dedicated renderer chat-stream deep reference for `chatStreamBackendIngress` dispatch ordering and fail-safe exception isolation, link it in chat stream/runtime docs hubs, and clarify in stream runtime docs that ingress bookkeeping failures cannot suppress event handler dispatch.
- docs(backend-runs-route-support-helper-contracts): add a dedicated backend API deep reference for `runs_support.py` helper boundaries (service singleton bootstrap, API-key guard env/header normalization, run-not-found/latest-event helper semantics, and route response projection contracts), and link it from `/api/runs` route docs and backend API hub pages.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-backend-ingress-transcript-undefined-fallback): add ingress regression ensuring transcript sync falls back to `undefined` conversation id when both active transcript ref and resolved event conversation ref are absent, preserving deterministic session-update call shape.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-active-conversation-projection-guards): extend `chatStreamEventRuntime.syncActiveConversationProjection` regressions to lock no-op paths (missing resolved ref, missing explicit event identity, same active ref, non-local mismatched active ref) and explicit promotion behavior when active conversation is empty.
- test(backend-remote-computer-use-argument-revalidation): extend remote computer-tool regressions to lock unified `computer_use` dispatch shape (`tool_name` remap + concrete `args` payload without metadata leakage) and fail-closed revalidation when selected subtool arguments are incomplete.
- test(sidecar-computer-use-subtool-and-arguments-guards): extend sidecar tool-registry regressions to fail closed when unified `computer_use` uses an unknown subtool name or non-object `arguments`, ensuring no concrete subtool execution occurs for malformed envelopes.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-stale-turn-terminal-handoff-matrix): extend `chatStreamEventRuntime.shouldIgnoreForStaleTurn` regressions to lock `idle/error` terminal-handoff allowance, no-turn passthrough, and null-active-turn allowance so first packets of the next turn are never dropped due to bookkeeping lag.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-backend-ingress-order-and-chain-continuity): extend ingress regressions to lock full-chain continuation when projection sync fails (turn-map + transcript + dispatch still execute) and to assert bookkeeping runs before handler dispatch, preserving deterministic event-flow ordering.
- test(sidecar-local-backend-computer-use-malformed-envelope-boundary): extend sidecar local-backend boundary regressions so malformed unified `computer_use` envelopes (unknown `tool`, non-object `arguments`) are rejected with stable error payloads and never invoke concrete subtools.
- test(backend-parser-metadata-presence-computer-use-gate): extend parser validation regressions to fail closed when `metadata` is missing (`None`) for both legacy computer-tool names and unified `computer_use`, while keeping non-computer tools metadata-agnostic.
- test(frontend-local-backend-rpc-computer-use-verbatim-malformed-envelope): extend frontend local-backend bridge RPC regressions so malformed unified `computer_use` envelopes are forwarded unchanged and sidecar-originated validation errors return verbatim, preserving strict boundary ownership.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-conversation-gate-fallback-matrix): extend conversation-routing regressions for `chatStreamConversationGate` to lock blank turn-map fallback handling, `memory-store` fallback from `event.session_id`, and null-return behavior for non-local or missing local payload conversation refs.
- test(backend-parser-types-unified-computer-use-subtool-normalization): extend parser extraction regressions to lock unified `computer_use` subtool trim/blank rejection behavior and explicit `arguments: null` fallback to `{}`, preserving deterministic normalization before validation.
- test(sidecar-local-backend-computer-use-metadata-sanitization): extend sidecar local-backend regressions to lock unified `computer_use` metadata normalization as a strict allowlist (`description`/`explanation`/`expectation` only), dropping extra metadata fields before concrete tool execution.
- test(backend-computer-use-metadata-extra-field-rejection): extend backend computer schema regressions so `ComputerUseMetadata` fails closed on unexpected metadata keys, reinforcing strict rationale-field enforcement at validation boundary.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-event-runtime-conversation-fallback-precedence): extend `resolveTargetConversationRef` regressions to lock compatibility-fallback routing (`memory-store` payload/event session ids, local-user payload conversation ref), explicit-ref precedence, and active-fallback conversation resolution.
- test(frontend-local-backend-tool-args-computer-use-malformed-envelope-pass-through): extend frontend local backend arg-resolver regressions so malformed unified `computer_use` envelopes remain verbatim (`tool` typo + non-object `arguments`) and validation ownership stays in sidecar runtime.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-backend-ingress-transcript-failure-bookkeeping-continuity): extend ingress regressions to lock that transcript session write failures do not suppress projection sync, turn-map registration, or event dispatch, preserving deterministic bookkeeping before handler execution.
- test(backend-parser-validation-legacy-computer-name-unified-compat-metadata): extend parser validation regressions so legacy computer subtool names (`mouse_control`) still enforce/normalize required metadata when only unified `computer_use` is registered.
- test(sidecar-tool-registry-computer-use-metadata-allowlist-normalization): extend sidecar registry regressions to lock unified `computer_use` metadata sanitization as an allowlist and ensure extra metadata keys are dropped before concrete subtool execution.
- test(frontend-local-backend-rpc-computer-use-nested-metadata-wrapper-pass-through): extend frontend local-backend RPC regressions so legacy nested `computer_use.arguments.metadata` wrappers are forwarded unchanged and rejected by sidecar with deterministic error payloads.
- fix(backend-parser-types-input-payload-mutation): make `ToolCallSchema.extract_tool_call` side-effect free by copying tool-args before metadata extraction so parser normalization no longer mutates inbound payload dictionaries; add regression coverage for direct and unified `computer_use` metadata immutability.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-conversation-ref-whitespace-fallback): trim explicit/event/payload conversation references in `resolveEventConversationRef` so whitespace ids no longer short-circuit valid memory-store/local-user fallback resolution; add regression coverage for memory-store payload and local-user payload whitespace cases.
- test(backend-remote-computer-use-request-id-fallback-generation): extend remote computer tool regressions so unified `RemoteComputerUseTool` generates deterministic fallback request ids when session metadata lacks `request_id`, matching legacy remote tool request-id behavior.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-conversation-ref-whitespace-precedence-fallbacks): extend conversation-gate regressions so whitespace top-level `conversation_ref` values fall through to local-user payload and memory-store payload fallbacks instead of blocking valid compatibility identifiers.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-event-runtime-whitespace-conversation-routing): extend `resolveTargetConversationRef` regressions to lock runtime routing behavior for whitespace compatibility ids (`memory-store` payload session whitespace fallback to event session id, and local-user top-level whitespace fallback to payload conversation ref).
- test(backend-tool-registry-computer-use-metadata-minlength-schema-contract): tighten registry schema-contract regression coverage to assert `description`/`explanation`/`expectation` metadata fields expose `minLength: 1` in unified `computer_use` declaration.
- test(backend-parser-validation-category-based-computer-tool-metadata-gate): extend parser validation regressions so metadata enforcement/normalization applies to any tool categorized as `ToolDomain.COMPUTER` (not only legacy names or unified `computer_use`).
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-backend-ingress-whitespace-ref-normalization): normalize ingress `conversationRef`/`turn_ref` with trim semantics so whitespace refs are treated as missing, preventing turn-map writes with blank ids and avoiding transcript session binding to whitespace conversation refs; add targeted ingress regressions for whitespace ref handling.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-backend-ingress-active-session-whitespace-fallback): normalize active transcript conversation ref before ingress transcript-session precedence so whitespace persisted refs no longer override valid resolved conversation refs during backend event ingestion.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-backend-ingress-trim-contract): extend ingress regressions to lock trim semantics for projection and transcript-session precedence (`conversationRef` + active transcript ref), preventing whitespace formatting drift from mutating routing behavior.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-conversation-gate-turn-fallback-trim-contract): extend conversation-gate regressions to lock trimmed turn-ref lookup, trimmed mapped-conversation fallback output, and null behavior when only whitespace fallback conversation refs are available.
- fix(frontend-chat-stream-stale-turn-whitespace-normalization): normalize turn-ref comparisons in stale-turn guards so whitespace turn ids are treated as missing and trimmed-equal refs are accepted, preventing false stale drops caused by formatting drift in backend event payloads.
- fix(sidecar-computer-use-subtool-name-trim-normalization): normalize unified `computer_use.tool` with trim semantics in sidecar registry so whitespace-padded subtool names route correctly (and still fail closed when empty/unknown); add sidecar/local-backend regressions for trimmed subtool envelopes.
- test(sidecar-computer-use-subtool-name-whitespace-fail-closed): extend sidecar/local-backend regressions to lock fail-closed behavior when unified `computer_use.tool` collapses to empty after trim, ensuring no concrete subtool execution occurs.
- fix(backend-parser-types-deep-copy-immutability): make `ToolCallSchema` extraction deep-copy nested args/metadata so downstream mutations of extracted tool-call payloads cannot alias into original parsed JSON structures; add regressions for standard and unified `computer_use` nested-argument immutability.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-backend-ingress-failsafe-chain): harden ingress recovery so exceptions in conversation projection sync and turn-map registration are treated as best-effort failures that cannot block transcript session sync or stream event dispatch; add regression coverage for both thrown-dependency paths.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-backend-ingress-turn-map-gates): extend ingress regression coverage to ensure `registerTurnConversationRef` only runs when both `conversationRef` and `event.turn_ref` are present, preventing accidental turn-map writes from partial payloads.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-backend-ingress-transcript-failsafe): make transcript session sync best-effort in `ingestBackendEvent` so exceptions from `updateTranscriptSession` cannot block stream event dispatch; add regression coverage for dispatch continuity under transcript update failure.
- refactor(fullstack-runs-route-support-split-and-chat-stream-hook-folder-reorg): extracted `/api/runs` shared service/auth/run-shaping helpers into `backend/src/api/routes/runs_support.py`, moved chat-stream helper hooks into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/hooks/chatStream/` (while keeping `useChatStream.ts` as the root stream entrypoint), rewired imports/tests/docs, and revalidated targeted backend/frontend suites plus refactor audit gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- docs(backend-remote-computer-use-dispatch-normalization): expand backend remote-tool docs to describe parser/native-bridge `computer_use` normalization into concrete computer subtools before remote dispatch, clarify when `RemoteComputerUseTool` and sidecar unified-router validation paths apply, and document cross-layer compatibility boundaries for direct/manual unified envelopes.
- docs(frontend-chat-loop-and-stream-runtime-contracts): add a dedicated renderer deep reference for `chatLoopUiState`/`useChatLoopUiState` disconnect-recovery watchdog and dashboard/chatbox surface projection behavior, refresh frontend runtime stream state-machine docs for the split `hooks/chatStream/*` ingress/turn-guard architecture, and align chat hub/reference pages with current module paths plus `memory-store` tracking-only renderer behavior.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-stale-turn-workspace-scoping): extend `chatStreamEventRuntime.shouldIgnoreForStaleTurn` regressions to ensure stale-turn checks and terminal-handoff exceptions are scoped to the target conversation workspace, preventing default-workspace state from leaking into other conversation streams.
- test(frontend-chat-stream-terminal-handoff-stale-gate): tighten `shouldIgnoreForStaleTurn` terminal-handoff semantics so next-turn first packets remain allowed, but late packets for the just-completed active turn are ignored; add runtime regression coverage for both paths.
- test(frontend-turn-scoped-handler-gate-contract): extend `useTurnScopedBackendEventHandler` regressions to ensure stale-turn guard receives the resolved conversation ref and is fully bypassed (not invoked) when `skipStaleTurnGate` is enabled for passthrough events.
- test(backend-parser-types-computer-use-metadata-extraction-boundary): extend `ToolCallSchema` regressions so unified `computer_use` keeps legacy nested `arguments.metadata` inside executable arguments (not promoted to parsed metadata) and safely ignores non-dict top-level metadata.
- test(frontend-local-backend-computer-use-arg-forwarding-boundary): extend frontend bridge arg-contract regressions so unified `computer_use` envelopes are forwarded verbatim (including legacy nested `arguments.metadata` wrappers) and missing top-level metadata is not auto-synthesized before sidecar validation.
- refactor(fullstack-folder-reorg-query-execution-and-chatstream-utils): reorganized backend query-execution support helpers into `backend/src/api/services/query_execution_support/`, reorganized frontend chat-stream utilities into `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/utils/chatStream/`, rewired imports/tests/docs to new folder boundaries, and revalidated lint/duplication/dead-code/API-routes consolidation gates.
- refactor(fullstack-folder-reorg-vm-run-control-and-toolrunner-utils): reorganized backend VM run-control helper modules under `backend/src/services/vm_run_control_support/`, reorganized frontend tool-runner utilities under `frontend/src/renderer/features/chat/utils/toolRunner/`, rewired all imports/docs/tests to new folder structure, and revalidated lint/duplication/dead-code/API-routes consolidation gates.
- refactor(fullstack-vm-worker-assignment-and-tool-execution-result-dispatch): extracted VM run-control queue assignment into `vm_run_control_assignment.py`, extracted `ToolExecutionService` result emission/backend envelope dispatch into `ToolExecutionResultDispatch.ts`, added focused backend/frontend regression coverage, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-vm-run-event-log-and-toolrunner-result-persistence): extracted VM run-control event append/list logic into `vm_run_control_event_log.py` and reused it from `VmRunControlService`, extracted `useToolRunner` tool/bundle UI+transcript callback persistence into `toolRunnerResultPersistence.ts`, added focused backend/frontend regression coverage, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-settings-validation-rules-and-wakeword-ref-init): extracted backend settings update field contracts into table-driven `settings_update_rules.py` consumed by `validate_settings_update`, added focused rule-helper regressions, and simplified wakeword capture guard initialization by deriving refs directly from persisted guard state (removing a mount-only effect).
- fix(frontend-wakeword-missing-device-remount-lockout): persisted wakeword missing-device startup lockout across hook remounts to prevent repeated `NotFoundError: Requested device not found` retries/log spam while wakeword remains enabled, added explicit reset on disable/re-enable, and added wakeword hook regression coverage for remount behavior.
- refactor(fullstack-query-pipeline-event-helper-and-toolrunner-backend-listener): extracted query stream pipeline forwarding/completion backfill helpers into `query_execution_pipeline_events.py` while keeping `QueryExecutionService` compatibility wrappers, extracted `useToolRunner` backend event subscription effect into `useToolRunnerBackendListener`, added focused backend helper regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-query-cancellation-helper-and-chatbox-bindings): extracted cancelled-query pending-tool-call reconciliation into `query_execution_cancellation.py` and kept `QueryExecutionService` wrapper compatibility surface, extracted `ChatBox` effect wiring into `useChatBoxBindings` (focus channel, wakeword STT trigger channel, drag globals, visual-anchor sync), added focused backend cancellation helper tests, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-rehydrate-transparency-helper-and-messageinput-ui-bindings): extracted rehydrate transparency/full-content/system-prompt resolution into `rehydrate_transparency_resolution.py` while keeping `RehydrateEntryNormalizer` focused on row routing/state, extracted `MessageInput` UI side-effect wiring into `useMessageInputUiBindings` (auto-resize, outside-click dismiss, send-lock close, focus token handling), added focused backend helper regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-rehydrate-toolcall-normalizer-and-chatinterface-bindings): extracted rehydrate tool-call parsing/normalization into `rehydrate_tool_call_normalization.py` and kept `RehydrateEntryNormalizer` as routing/state orchestration, extracted `ChatInterface` listener effects into `useChatInterfaceBindings` hooks (audio stream listener, menu-dismiss, stop-shortcut, dashboard new-chat), added focused backend helper regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-query-input-shaping-and-wakeword-missing-device-lockout): extracted query payload/image-data shaping from `QueryExecutionService` into `query_execution_inputs.py` with focused backend regressions, hardened `useWakewordDetection` missing-microphone behavior by adding lockout until disable/re-enable (prevents repeated `NotFoundError` start loops), added frontend hook coverage, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-query-stream-state-and-chat-stream-ingress): extracted mutable query stream tracking state into `query_execution_stream_state.py`, extracted renderer backend-event ingress orchestration into `chatStreamBackendIngress.ts`, added focused backend/frontend helper regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-vm-pending-controls-and-transcript-flush-helper): extracted VM pending-control command creation/drain logic into `vm_run_control_pending_controls.py`, extracted transcript pending flush/requeue loop into `transcriptPendingFlush.ts`, added focused backend/frontend helper regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-vm-event-payload-builders-and-chat-stream-text-handlers): extracted VM run-control event payload builders into `vm_run_control_event_payloads.py`, extracted `llm-thought`/`streaming-response` text handlers from `useChatStream` into `useChatStreamTextHandlers`, added backend payload-builder regression coverage, and kept refactor gates clean (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-route clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-vm-run-transitions-and-chat-stream-completion-hook): extracted VM run-control status transition rules into `vm_run_control_transitions.py` with dedicated transition tests, extracted `streaming-complete` finalization/transcript-write flow from `useChatStream` into `useChatStreamCompletionHandler`, and updated runtime docs while keeping audit gates clean (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, API-routes clone scan all passing).
- refactor(fullstack-vm-worker-state-and-chat-stream-turn-scope): extracted VM run-control shared helpers into `vm_run_control_helpers` and `vm_run_control_worker_state` to dedupe worker payload/state shaping and run event construction, introduced reusable `useTurnScopedBackendEventHandler` to consolidate turn-scoped stale-event guards in `useChatStream`, added focused frontend hook tests, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, and API-routes clone scan remain 0 clones).
- refactor(fullstack-query-runtime-and-transcript-record-helper): extracted query screenshot/runtime-state/stream-context helpers to `backend/src/api/services/query_execution_runtime.py` while preserving `QueryExecutionService` compatibility wrappers, extracted shared transcript immediate-write + retry gate to `frontend/src/renderer/infrastructure/transcript/transcriptRecordWrite.ts`, reduced `query_execution.py` size (516 -> 437 LOC) and `TranscriptWriter.ts` size (502 -> 500 LOC), added focused frontend helper tests, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, and API-routes clone scan remain clean at 0 clones).
- refactor(backend-runs-route-model-extraction-and-frontend-chat-header-split): extracted `/api/runs` request/response schemas into `backend/src/api/routes/run_models.py`, deduplicated repeated run/event validation paths in `runs.py`, split `ChatInterface` header/dropdown/window-control UI into `ChatInterfaceHeaderControls`, reduced `runs.py` size (430 -> 293 LOC) and `ChatInterface.jsx` size (526 -> 405 LOC), and revalidated targeted route/chat wiring tests plus refactor gates (`lint:audit`, `knip`, `jscpd`, and backend API-routes clone scan all clean at 0 clones).
- refactor(frontend-memory-section-state-decomposition): extracted MemorySection derived-state selectors (active type resolution, query filtering, local-memory draft shaping) into `memorySectionState`, reduced `MemorySection.jsx` size (381 -> 354 LOC), added focused helper regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`/`knip`/`jscpd` clean; API-routes clone scan remains 0).
- refactor(frontend-chatbox-state-decomposition): extracted ChatBox drag/anchor/screenshot-preview state helpers into `chatBoxState`, reduced `ChatBox.jsx` size (418 -> 408 LOC), added focused ChatBox state regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`/`knip`/`jscpd` clean; API-routes clone scan remains 0).
- refactor(frontend-chatbox-response-state-decomposition): extracted ChatBox response state selectors (closeability, thinking-text normalization, source-tag gating, markdown eligibility) into `chatBoxResponseState`, reduced `ChatBoxResponse.jsx` size (398 -> 392 LOC), added focused state regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`/`knip`/`jscpd` clean; API-routes clone scan remains 0).
- refactor(frontend-tool-execution-screenshot-selection-decomposition): extracted screenshot/image selection and upload metadata derivation from `ToolExecutionService` into `ToolExecutionScreenshotSelection`, reduced `ToolExecutionService.ts` size (456 -> 446 LOC), added focused screenshot-selection regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`/`knip`/`jscpd` clean; API-routes clone scan remains 0).
- refactor(frontend-message-list-state-decomposition): extracted MessageList scroll and render-state selectors (`awaiting-dot` target, compaction status mapping, action gating) into `messageListState`, reduced `MessageList.jsx` size (442 -> 361 LOC), added focused utility regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`/`knip`/`jscpd` clean; API-routes clone scan remains 0).
- refactor(frontend-dashboard-conversation-load-decomposition): extracted recent conversation load/retry normalization into `dashboardConversationLoad` helpers, reduced `useDashboardConversations.js` size (450 -> 423 LOC), added focused load/retry utility regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`/`knip`/`jscpd` clean; API-routes clone scan remains 0).
- fix(frontend-wakeword-capture-retry-loop): harden `useWakewordDetection` startup by preventing concurrent capture starts, preserving local microphone-capture errors across healthy status heartbeats, throttling retry attempts after local failures (`3s`), and mapping missing-device `NotFoundError` to a clearer error message; add focused hook regression coverage for sticky local errors and retry-loop prevention.
- refactor(frontend-chat-stream-handler-decomposition): extracted context-compaction and metadata stream handlers from `useChatStream` into dedicated hooks (`useChatStreamCompactionHandlers`, `useChatStreamMetadataHandlers`), reduced `useChatStream.ts` size (607 -> 494 LOC), added focused hook regressions, and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`/`knip`/`jscpd` clean; API-routes clone scan still 0).
- refactor(frontend-chat-store-workspace-decomposition): extracted chat workspace normalization/read logic from `chatStore` into `chatWorkspaceState` helpers, reduced `chatStore.ts` size (544 -> 454 LOC), added focused workspace-state regressions (`ChatWorkspaceState.test.ts`), and revalidated refactor gates (`lint:audit`/`knip`/`jscpd` clean with API-routes clone scan still 0).
- refactor(frontend-chat-message-sender-decomposition): extracted payload/attachment normalization and readable-file attachment-context assembly from `useChatMessageSender` into a dedicated utility (`chatMessageSenderPayloads`), reduced hook size (465 -> 322 LOC), added focused helper regressions, and revalidated all refactor gates (`jscpd`/`knip`/react-compiler/deprecation audits clean with API routes remaining 0-clone).
- refactor(frontend-tool-runner-decomposition): extracted tool-runner turn guard and tracked-execution acceptance logic from `useToolRunner` into dedicated utilities (`toolRunnerEventGuards`, `toolRunnerExecutionState`), reduced `useToolRunner.ts` size (439 -> 389 LOC), added focused execution-state regression coverage, refreshed slow-test timing baselines, and kept refactor gates clean (`jscpd`/`knip`/react-compiler/deprecation + API-routes clone scan all clean).
- refactor(frontend-transcript-writer-split-and-safe-dependency-patches): extracted transcript transparency normalization and session-sync payload parsing from `TranscriptWriter` into dedicated helpers with focused tests (`TranscriptTransparencyNormalization`, `TranscriptSessionSyncPayload`), reduced `TranscriptWriter.ts` size (604 -> 502 LOC), applied safe frontend patch upgrades (`electron`, `katex`, `marked`, `lucide-react`), and revalidated all refactor gates (`jscpd`/`knip`/react-compiler/deprecation audits clean; API routes still 0 clone hotspots).
- refactor(frontend-chat-stream-runtime-split-and-dashboard-test-speed): extracted stream event conversation/turn/tracking runtime logic from `useChatStream` into `chatStreamEventRuntime` with focused regressions, reduced `useChatStream.ts` size (640 -> 607 LOC), trimmed redundant microtask drains in `ChatGptDashboardShell` tests, and improved dashboard-shell suite runtime (~18% in full-suite report) while keeping `jscpd`/`knip`/react-compiler/deprecation audits clean and API-route consolidation scan at 0 clones.
- refactor(frontend-chat-selector-decomposition-and-test-tuning): extracted ChatInterface model/provider option derivation into `chatModelOptions` utilities, reduced `ChatInterface.jsx` size (612 -> 526 LOC), added `ChatModelOptions` regression coverage, tuned `ToolExecutionService` test lifecycle setup to reduce per-test overhead, and revalidated refactor gates (`jscpd`/`knip`/react-compiler/deprecation audits all clean) including API-route clone scan (`backend/src/api/routes` remains 0 clones).
- refactor(frontend-chat-stream-transparency-utility): extracted `useChatStream` transcript transparency assembly into `chatStreamTransparency` helper, added focused frontend coverage for turn-matched transparency shaping and empty-field pruning, and revalidated audit gates (`jscpd=0 clones`, `knip` clean, react-compiler/deprecation lint audits clean) plus backend API route consolidation review (no merge needed).
- fix(frontend-all-next-turn-stream-gate): relax chat stream stale-turn filtering during pending-next-turn handoff (`isSending=true` + terminal phase) so first chunks for new turns are not dropped when `local-user-message` echo is late/missing; add turn-guard utility coverage and stream-state regression for post-terminal follow-up sends.
- feat(frontend-all-dev-source-badge-message-token-estimates): append per-message token telemetry to dev source badges for user/tool rows (`tokens~`), including user text token estimation from `fullUserMessage.content` fallback + image estimate breakdown (`txt/img/total`) and tool-call/tool-output payload token estimates; add focused renderer tests for token derivation and badge render gating.
- fix(frontend-all-chat-pill-terminal-unlock): treat `complete`/`error` overlay phases as terminal in chat-loop lock resolution even when `isSending` is stale, so chat pill exits working tint and re-enables input after final assistant text; add `ChatLoopUiState` utility + hook regressions for stale send-latch terminal snapshots.
- test(sidecar-local-backend-computer-use-legacy-wrapper-rejection): extend JSON-RPC boundary regressions so legacy nested `computer_use.arguments.metadata` wrapper payloads fail closed (`computer_use.metadata must be an object`) before concrete subtool execution.
- test(backend-parser-metadata-type-guards): extend parser validation regressions for computer-use metadata type strictness by rejecting non-string required fields for concrete computer tools and non-dict metadata payloads for unified `computer_use`.
- test(sidecar-local-backend-computer-use-metadata-boundary): add `LocalBackend._handle_execute_tool` regressions with real `ToolRegistry` to ensure invalid unified `computer_use` metadata failures propagate at JSON-RPC boundary and trimmed-valid metadata still routes to concrete subtools deterministically.
- test(backend-unified-computer-use-metadata-extraction-boundary): expand native tool-call bridge regressions so only top-level `computer_use.metadata` is promoted to parsed call metadata, nested `arguments.metadata` remains in tool arguments, and non-dict top-level metadata is ignored safely.
- docs(backend-unified-metadata-promotion-boundary): update backend native tool-call bridge/parser trust-boundary references to explicitly document top-level-only `computer_use.metadata` promotion, nested `arguments.metadata` retention in executable params, and safe ignore semantics for non-dict top-level metadata.
- test(sidecar-computer-use-metadata-envelope-strictness): extend sidecar regression coverage for strict top-level unified `computer_use.metadata` placement by rejecting legacy nested `arguments.metadata` wrappers and non-string required metadata fields before concrete subtool execution.
- docs(agent-tool-bridge-and-hubs): add a dedicated backend agent reference for `tool_call_bridge` (native tool-call normalization, `computer_use` mapping, history-call shaping, and recoverable helper contracts), and wire backend/frontend docs hubs to the new backend bridge and renderer permission-store deep references.
- docs(computer-use-cross-layer-sidecar-enforcement): expand backend remote-tool and frontend sidecar registry references with top-level unified metadata requirements, nested `arguments.metadata` rejection behavior, non-string metadata fail-closed semantics, and sidecar delegation boundaries for unified `computer_use` routing.
- test(sidecar-computer-use-metadata-runtime-enforcement): fail closed in sidecar `ToolRegistry` when unified `computer_use` envelopes omit/blank required metadata (`description`, `explanation`, `expectation`) and add regressions for missing, whitespace-only, missing-field, and trimmed-valid paths.
- test(frontend-stale-turn-memory-store-gate): guard chat-stream `memory-store` handling by active turn so stale old-turn memory-store events cannot overwrite `streamTracking.activeTurnRef` or mutate current turn tracking counters.
- test(frontend-stale-turn-tool-lifecycle-gate): guard chat-stream `tool-call`, `tool-output`, and `tool-bundle` handlers by active turn so stale old-turn tool lifecycle packets cannot clear active sending/thinking state, append stale tool messages, or increment current turn tracking counters.
- test(frontend-stale-turn-live-stream-gate): guard chat-stream `llm-thought` and `streaming-response` handlers by active turn so stale old-turn live-thought/chunk events cannot clear active send state, mutate current thinking text, or append stale assistant text during newer in-flight turns.
- docs(backend-tool-call-bridge-recovery-contracts): expand backend parser/recovery references with native tool-call bridge normalization rules (`computer_use` mapping, metadata merge, history-id fallback) and recoverable malformed-tool output diagnostics (`Raw arguments preview` extraction, target-file detection, and retry/edit strategy lines).
- docs(frontend-permission-store-contract): add dedicated renderer permission-store reference covering gate-state formulas, status normalization, merge-vs-replace update semantics, bootstrap failure behavior, and retained `requestPermission` action contract despite current ControlCenter UI not exposing a request button.
- test(frontend-stale-turn-compaction-gate): guard chat-stream context-compaction lifecycle events (`context-compaction-started/completed/failed`) by active turn so stale old-turn compaction packets cannot override current thinking status/source or stream-tracking phase during newer in-flight turns.
- test(frontend-stale-turn-metadata-gate): guard chat-stream metadata enrichment events (`system-prompt`, `user-message-full`, `assistant-message-full`, `tool-schemas`) by active turn so stale old-turn metadata packets cannot mutate current in-flight turn transcript/message metadata.
- docs(frontend-permissions-settings-runtime-alignment): refresh renderer/frontend architecture and inventory docs to match current non-permission-gated startup, current permissions surface (`PermissionControlCenter` + store-derived gate state), and current `SettingsSection` behavior (general tab + optional `data-controls` route branch).
- test(frontend-stale-turn-token-count-gate): guard chat-stream `token-count` handling by active turn so stale turn token updates cannot overwrite active turn usage counters during in-flight responses.
- test(tool-result-state-fallback-precedence): harden backend tool-result routing so malformed `system_state_internal` no longer blocks valid legacy `system_state` updates, with individual and bundle regressions that lock fallback precedence.
- test(frontend-stale-turn-error-gate): guard chat-stream `error` handling by active turn so stale terminal error events cannot clear sending/thinking state, overwrite stream tracking phase, or append erroneous error messages for newer in-flight turns.
- test(parser-computer-use-metadata-normalization): normalize and trim required computer-use metadata fields in parser validation so parsed tool-call metadata is canonical (`description`/`explanation`/`expectation` stripped), with regressions for trimmed success and whitespace-only rejection on unified `computer_use` responses.
- test(frontend-stale-turn-terminal-gate): guard chat-stream `streaming-complete` handling so stale terminal events (`turn_ref` not equal to active turn) are ignored and cannot clear active sending/thinking state or complete newer in-flight assistant messages.
- test(query-terminal-error-gate): add backend query-handler regression ensuring events emitted after a terminal `error` event are ignored, preventing late post-error chunks from mutating stream output.
- test(computer-use-envelope-boundary-parity): add paired frontend bridge RPC and sidecar local-backend regressions to ensure unified `computer_use` envelope payloads (`tool`, required `metadata`, and nested `arguments`) are forwarded unchanged across `execute_tool` IPC boundaries.
- docs(backend-frontend-parser-stream-runtime-detail): expand backend computer-tool contract docs for unified-declaration/legacy-subtool compatibility and strict metadata expectations, add remote-tool compatibility notes, and deepen frontend chat-stream runtime docs for modular handler wiring, transcript session sync fallback, and streaming-complete transcript/transparency write conditions.
- docs(parser-tooling-and-stream-scoping): refresh backend parser trust-boundary docs for unified `computer_use` normalization rules, legacy concrete-subtool whitelist compatibility, and strict non-whitespace metadata requirements; update frontend stream utility/runtime docs to match strict turn-scoped `streaming-complete` assistant targeting, duplicate-complete transcript guards, and workspace-scoped message updater selectors.
- test(computer-use-metadata-schema-strictness): enforce whitespace-stripping at `ComputerUseMetadata` schema level so `description`/`explanation`/`expectation` reject whitespace-only values across all call paths (not parser-only), and add backend regressions for reject + trim behavior.
- test(tool-result-bundle-state-parity): add backend bundle-route regressions to ensure omitted state keys preserve existing runtime system-state and explicit `system_state_internal: null` still clears it, matching individual tool-result semantics.
- test(frontend-stale-turn-stream-complete-gate): make `streaming-complete` assistant selection strict to provided `turn_ref` (no fallback to latest assistant message when the turn is missing), and add frontend regressions to prevent stale turn completions from marking active replies complete or writing transcript rows.
- test(tool-result-state-transitions): preserve existing session system-state when tool-result payloads omit `system_state`/`system_state_internal`, while keeping explicit `null` state payloads able to clear runtime state; add backend router regressions for both behaviors.
- test(query-terminal-idempotence): gate backend query stream processing after first terminal event to ignore late/duplicate post-terminal chunks, and add frontend transcript regression coverage ensuring duplicate `streaming-complete` events do not duplicate assistant transcript rows.
- test(ipc-contract-parity): add backend websocket `tool-result` parser contract coverage, backend tool-result handler serialization fallback tests, sidecar local-backend execute-tool boundary-field passthrough regression, and frontend envelope parity + bridge-args passthrough tests for `computer_use` and `run_shell_command`.
- refactor(frontend-all-tool-execution-backend-payloads): extract tool-result/tool-bundle-result backend envelope assembly into a dedicated `ToolExecutionBackendPayload` helper, rewire `ToolExecutionService` to the shared builders, add focused frontend regression tests for envelope field gating, and refresh tool-execution runtime docs.
- refactor(frontend-all-tool-execution-service-decomposition): extract image/screenshot payload parsing from `ToolExecutionService` into `ToolExecutionImagePayload` helpers, add focused frontend regression coverage for payload parsing/ref extraction behavior, and update runtime tool-execution docs to include the new helper module.
- refactor(frontend-all-surface-log-gate-and-knip-cleanup): suppress `SurfaceOrchestrator` transition logs by default in `test` (keep `window.__WINDIE_VERBOSE_TOOL_LOGS__` override), update capture/logging-gate regressions to explicitly opt into verbose assertions, remove stale `knip` ignore for `src/main/test_shell.cjs`, and refresh frontend runtime docs for the new log policy.
- test(bundle-lifecycle-contracts): add backend/frontend regression coverage for bundle step mismatch handling, bundle-error fallback propagation, tool-bundle boundary payload forwarding, capture-failure behavior in bundle runner, and deterministic `partial_failure` status for incomplete bundle results.
- docs(frontend-app-startup-vm-onboarding-runtime): add renderer deep reference for `App.jsx` startup routing (VM mode query gate, frontend onboarding slideshow persistence, wakeword-controller mount boundary, and permission-gate removal from startup), and update renderer runtime/hubs to reflect current non-permission-gated startup flow.
- refactor(frontend-sidecar-backend-all-dedupe-and-dead-code): dedupe chat image data-URL parsing across clipboard/file attachments, centralize sidecar env-flag parsing + screenshot cursor-overlay internals, dedupe VM run-control event/control command paths, remove unused `PermissionOnboardingWizard` component and stale tests, and add focused frontend/sidecar regression coverage (`DataUrlImageUtils`, `FileAttachmentUtils`, `env_flags`).
- docs(backend-computer-schemas-and-frontend-attachment-utils): add backend tools-contract reference for computer tool schema validation and unified `computer_use` envelope/parser coupling (mouse/keyboard/scroll conditional rules, metadata enforcement, unified-to-concrete mapping), and add frontend chat presentation reference for shared data-URL image parsing/attachment payload utilities (`dataUrlImageUtils`, `clipboardImageUtils`, `fileAttachmentUtils`) with MessageInput payload contracts and hub wiring.
- docs(backend-sdk-and-frontend-tool-catalog-contracts): refresh backend SDK tool-schema docs for local `$defs` inlining/`allOf` flattening/object-type enforcement behavior in `Tool.get_json_schema`, and add a new frontend renderer infrastructure reference for `ToolComputerUseCatalog` (interactive vs capture-only tool sets, unified `computer_use` exclusion, surface-mode coupling, and auto-capture classification); wire frontend hubs/runtime docs to the new page.
- docs(backend-remote-computer-use-contract): expand backend remote-tool payload/reference docs to cover unified `computer_use` envelope validation (`tool` + required metadata + tool-specific `arguments` re-validation), mouse OCR/prediction schema guidance contract, and request-id/payload-shape implications across direct vs unified computer tool stubs.
- refactor(frontend-sidecar-all-computer-use-contract): align backend/sidecar unified `computer_use` exposure and sidecar dispatch routing, remove deprecated global `<tool_chaining_guidelines>` prompt block while preserving required interaction tags, refresh backend contract tests for `interaction_mode=agent` and unified chat allowlist/tool-selection normalization, and add sidecar regression coverage for `computer_use` delegation.
- docs(frontend-incoming-text-normalization-reference): add a dedicated renderer infrastructure reference for incoming text normalization (`incomingTextNormalization.ts`) covering mojibake repair, lone-surrogate handling, stream/transcript integration points, and test-backed invariants; wire renderer/frontend docs hubs to the new page and refresh frontend inventory/matrix snapshots to 429 covered files (main 58, sidecar 156, renderer 201, landing 13, preload 1).
- docs(api-services-compaction-maps): refresh backend API control-path docs to include `runs` REST surface and `compact-history` websocket handler semantics, replace corrupted `docs/backend/services/services_and_storage.md` with a current services/storage runtime map, and add a dedicated VM run-control service reference with hub wiring; also extend frontend runtime-path docs with VM worker `/api/runs/*` endpoint and auth-header details.
- docs(backend-runs-vm-control): add deep backend API reference for `/api/runs` and `VmRunControlService` (worker assignment queue, control-command fanout, event sequencing), wire backend API hubs to the new page, and refresh backend inventory/capability snapshots with current file counts plus run-control ownership coverage.
- docs(frontend-vm-worker-oauth-runtime): add deep main-process reference for VM worker runs bridge and OpenAI Codex OAuth PKCE flow, wire frontend main/hub docs to the new page, and refresh frontend inventory/capability snapshots with current file counts plus VM worker/runtime-mode coverage.
- refactor(frontend-permission-gate-removal): remove renderer startup permission gating from `App` so dashboard/onboarding no longer blocks on permission grant flows, and remove Data Controls per-permission `Request` action from the frontend permission center UI (status + re-check only), with renderer docs updated to match.
- feat(config-openai-codex-oauth): add end-to-end OpenAI Codex OAuth provider wiring across backend config/schema validation, Electron IPC + preload channels, dashboard settings UI, runtime storage/filtering, and targeted backend/frontend tests/documentation updates.
- refactor(frontend-chat-session-startup-bootstrap): add shared renderer session bootstrap (`useChatSessionBootstrap`) that hydrates transcript/chat active conversation refs from main-process snapshot before first-send fallback ref generation, extend `get-client-user-id` payload with conversation/session metadata, wire send-path fallback to consult main snapshot before creating new refs, and add frontend regressions for bootstrap/send continuity plus runtime/docs/agent-contract updates to lock startup/chat-pill race behavior.
- refactor(frontend-chat-screenshot-attachment-contract): centralize message-send screenshot attachment normalization in `screenshotAttachmentContract` so clipboard uploads, auto-capture artifact-only responses (`screenshot_ref`/`screenshot_url`), and fallback attachment selection share one deterministic path with deduped `screenshot_refs`; update chat send docs and add dedicated frontend contract tests.
